programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 2
programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT1
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT2
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 3
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 3

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.
programme.sub-title: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.
programme.sub-title: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Himmelhvelvet
programme.desc: Dylan hører stemmer som tilsier ham til en planet med 'ild og is'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: Mens han er fanget i en kamp mellom to Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter, fanger mannskapet en fiendtlig som hevder at stoltheten hans har et kart over slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: Illusjonen av majestet
programme.desc: En feil sving etter å ha gått ut av en slipstream sender Andromeda inn i Prolon-systemet. De redder en fluktpute fra en viss katastrofe, men stoltheten vil ha den tilbake.

programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: Mannskapet søker en tapt koloni av Nietzscheans og oppdager et annet mannskap som i det skjulte har hjulpet dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dommens dag, Vredens dag
programme.desc: Mannskapet installerer en ny AI i et nytt Commonwealth-slagskip, og naturlig nok går ikke ting som de skal.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen
programme.desc: Tyr overbeviser Nietzscheans at han er reinkarnasjonen til Drago Museveni.
programme.sub-title: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen

programme.title: Andromeda: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt
programme.desc: En melding fra en samler sender Dylan på et oppdrag for å redde et gissel og finne restene av Commonwealth-flåten.
programme.sub-title: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt

programme.title: Andromeda: Biter av åtte
programme.desc: Citizen Eight prøver å fjerne Dylan fra kommandoen over Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Waking the Tyrant's Device
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stoppe en verdensbygger før han setter i gang en annen invasjon.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbelt eller ingenting
programme.desc: Dylan blir kidnappet av Nietzscheans og tvunget til å spille tankespill til underholdning for fangene hans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper/Slett
programme.desc: To Nietzschean-søsken er i en avstand over et våpen som kan eliminere høyere hjernefunksjoner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Snart den nærende virvelen
programme.desc: Tyr kommer tilbake, etter å ha sluttet seg til Collectors, og krever aldersruten fra sine tidligere besetningsmedlemmer.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice from Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of Truth
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impression
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken For Dead
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Perfect Heist
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out Of The Grave
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives: From The Ashes
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Undaunted
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Dosage
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder For Hire
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Misplaced Loyalty
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Taste of Poison
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Left At The Scene
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Seeds of Destruction
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Web of Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: 14 Ghosts of The Bate Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to Macclesfield, Cheshire to investigate a building said to be haunted by 14 ghosts and also the lost soul of a witch. With so many spirits in one of the oldest public houses in the UK, will any of the ghosts join him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Full House at Northwich Plaza and Bingo Hall
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head into Northwich, Cheshire to investigate a disused bingo hall. Bex braves a lone vigil, which she will never forget as a door seemingly opens on its own.
programme.sub-title: Full House at Northwich Plaza and Bingo Hall

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Streets
programme.desc: Hidden underground for years in Keighley West Yorkshire. Ghost Dimension investigate haunted Victorian Streets, used during the war as bombing shelters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The House of The Devil
programme.desc: The island of Gran Canaria houses some of the most haunted buildings in the world and tonight the team fly to the island and investigate claims of satanic worship and paranormal activity in a house that is believed to have been built by the Devil himself

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.
programme.sub-title: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Factory - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean and Bex investigate their deadliest and most haunted location: The Factory. Whatever lurks inside, has the power to shake an entire building. Dark forces are hiding within the location and expose themselves on tonight’s investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Factory - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean and Bex return to the Factory with guest Kay. Their most haunted investigation ever continues as they uncover secrets of paranormal activity hauntings inside of the Factory. Something dark lurks inside!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Who is There?
programme.desc: Could a cemetery be haunted? The team come head out to find out and contact restless souls that have been haunting the graveyard.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Haunted Grotto
programme.desc: Hidden secrets and a mischievous ghost are hiding in a haunted cave in Sefton Park. Ghost Dimension make contact with strange paranormal entities, that put on a full display of ghostly activity! Could this be the most haunted adventure yet?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Hotel of Horror
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension heads to Halewood and investigates the Wellington Hotel, believed to be a hive of paranormal activity. Will they uncover what is haunting this public house?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Family Full of Ghosts
programme.desc: The duo come into direct contact with spirits haunting the location. Even during the day there is no shortage of ghostly activity, on this lock down special paranormal Ghost Dimension investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Plas Teg
programme.desc: The county of Flintshire in Wales is said to be a land filled with ghosts and haunts. Plas Teg is said to be one of the "most haunted" houses in the area. With over 400 years of history, this place is sure to be the home of many an entity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Halloween Special: Chillingham Castle
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Chillingham Castle for a Halloween investigation. The most haunted castle in the world. Reports of paranormal activity are daily here, so what will the team manage to capture tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Washed Away Air Raid
programme.desc: This abandoned World War Two air raid shelter holds paranormal secrets that haunt anyone that ventures inside. A ghostly entity makes contacts they team uncover the whats behind the hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Ammo Store Explosion
programme.desc: Simonswood Supply Depot was one of the main ammunition depots in Lancashire, England during World War II. Located at Simonswood, it was used as an ammunition depot delivered by ROF Kirkby.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Ewloe Castle in North Wales
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean head to Ewloe Castle in North Wales, believed to be haunted by ghosts and spirits. What will they uncover as they delve deep into the castle ruins? and seek out its hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.
programme.sub-title: Final Session at Galleries of Justice

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail That Test!
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have a 9-month-old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?
programme.sub-title: You Better Not Fail That Test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.
programme.sub-title: How Could You Cover for Him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
programme.sub-title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?
programme.sub-title: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?
programme.sub-title: Look What You Did to Your Baby

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?
programme.sub-title: I Did It To Hurt You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.
programme.sub-title: I Left You, But You Are The Father

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Were You Ever Even Pregnant?
programme.desc: Kaliegh is 23 but has been a heroin addict for five years. Her mom, best friend, and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?
programme.sub-title: These DNA Results Will Floor You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!
programme.sub-title: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?
programme.sub-title: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: the corpse of a man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood On the Tracks
programme.desc: When an unsuspecting train conductor discovers a decapitated body on a lonely stretch of track, Lt. Joe Kenda must unravel the mystery of his death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense—but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: The murder of a popular teen at a crowded house party sends Kenda down a winding road paved with lies, misdirection, and innuendo.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. But six months later, Kenda receives an unprompted confession .

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: The Hills: Put On A Happy Face
programme.desc: Heidis hjemkomst blir ødelagt når moren hennes misliker hennes plastisk kirurgi. Kristin og jentene drar til Miami for Super Bowl-helgen, men det blir dårlig stemning når den harde festingen hennes begynner å bekymre Audrina, Lo og Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Når ryktene begynner å spres om Kristins festing, får Stephanie skylden. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr, men det stopper ikke Brody fra å prøve seg på henne. Spencer blir opprørt når han møter på Stephanie på Kristins fest.

programme.title: The Hills: The Elephant In The Room
programme.desc: Heidi arrangerer en fest for naboen hennes, men det blir overskygget av at Spencer blir sint på Holly. Kristin oppfordrer Audrina til å forplikte seg til Ryan, og prøver deretter å komme nærmere Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: This Is Goodbye
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencers oppførsel fører til at deres venner og familie tar et vanskelig valg. Kristin og Brody roter, men er enige om å fortsette som single. Ryan skuffer Audrina når han ikke dukker opp for en kveld på byen.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Bird
programme.desc: Brody risikerer sitt vennskap med Kristin når han begynner å date ei annen jente. Lo setter Stephanie opp på en dobbeldate. Ryan gir Audrinas venner en ny sjanse.

programme.title: The Hills: Ghost From The Past
programme.desc: Kristin sliter med å gå videre etter Brody. Audrina møter på Justin og begynner å tvile på sitt forhold til Ryan. Lo blir venn med Brodys nye kjæreste.

programme.title: The Hills: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Brodys nye flamme gjør en fiende av Kristin når hun tar med seg en gammel rival av Kristins på en fest. Ryan kommer tilbake fra turneen, men Audrina forteller ham ikke at hun møtte Justin mens han var borte.

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.
programme.sub-title: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.
programme.sub-title: A Legend in His Own Mind

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.
programme.sub-title: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends
programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Are We Exclusive?
programme.desc: Kaitlynn & Brody's 'A-liste'-galla splitter gruppen når hun ekskluderer deler av gjengen. Audrina overrasker alle med en nytenning av en lidenskapelig romanse med en gammel flamme. Spencer forbløffer Heidi med en overdådig overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: This Hangover Better Be Expensive
programme.desc: Forholdet til Brody og Kaitlynn er stadig anstrengende og de går til en fertilitetsspesialist. Heidi og Spencer forbereder seg for sin kommende wow-fornyelse med duellerende utdrikningslag. Brandon har vanskelig for å definere det nye forholdet.

programme.title: The Hills: Out With The Old
programme.desc: Etter en vaklevoren sommer med kjæresten Jason, bestemmer Lauren seg for å gjøre det slutt og drar tilbake til Teen Vogue for å møte sin mindre glade sjef. Heidi får problemer med en fyr som både hun og Audrina dater.

programme.title: The Hills: When You Least Expect It
programme.desc: Lauren går på sin første date siden Jason, og blir satt på prøve på jobben når hun bes om å gjøre sitt første moteshow. Heidi har en livsavgjørende hemmelighet hun må fortelle om til kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: The Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Når Audrina dukker opp i Heidis bursdag uten invitasjon, forstår hun at Heidi ikke er villig til å tilgi og glemme. Lauren, som har bestemt seg for å konsentrere seg om jobben, blir forført av sjarmen til Brody, den nye typen i livet hennes.

programme.title: The Hills: Who Do You Trust?
programme.desc: Audrina forteller Heidi at Spencer er en lurendreier, men Heidi stiller seg tvilende - til hun ser det med egen øyne. Lauren fortsetter å lure på om hun er klar for et forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: One Big Interruption
programme.desc: Heidi tar en pause fra Spencer, men savner ham mer en hun trodde hun ville. Lauren må planlegge en Teen Vogue-middag, men distraheres når hun må hjelpe praktikanten Emily fra New York.

programme.title: The Hills: You Have Chosen
programme.desc: Når Lauren forteller Heidi hva hun egentlig syns om Spencer, må Heidi velge mellom bestevennen sin og kjæresten.

programme.title: The Hills: With Friends Like These...
programme.desc: Lauren forstår at hun ikke kan stole på bestevennene sine etter at Heidi spleiser Jen med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: Spencer ber Heidi om å flytte inn hos ham, men Heidi vet ikke hva hun skal gjøre, eller hvordan hun skal fortelle det til samboeren Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Year, New Friends
programme.desc: Laurens 21-årsdag er full av overraskelser - Heidi og Audrina holder selskap for henne. Jen gjør et forsøk på å slutte fred med Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: Apology Not Accepted
programme.desc: Lauren fyller 21 år og Heidi har store planer for bursdagsfeiringen. Men, rett før festen bestemmer Heidi seg for å fortelle Lauren om Spencers ide om at de skal flytte sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: Goodbye for Now
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen når spenningen sitt toppunkt når Heidi tar et endelig valg angående å flytte sammen med Spencer. Lauren går til Audrina for å fylle tomrommet etter bestevennen sin, og Whitney flyr til New York City til et intervju.

programme.title: The Hills: You Know What You Did
programme.desc: Lauren drar ikke til Heidi og Spencers innflyttingsfest da hun får høre at Heidi har spredd rykter om henne. Men når Lauren og Heidi støter på hverandre, begynner de å krangle verre enn de noen gang har gjort før.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Clash Of The Titans
programme.desc: En supersexy eks ankommer og skaper drama. Jordan er ute etter Chloe, og når Marty søker trøst hos noen andre, blir det et Geordie-oppgjør.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Max Makes His Move
programme.desc: Følelser raser i villaen når Chloe gjør Marty forbanna, Max og Georgias kjærlighet blusser opp igjen, og Dean har planer for Che, men vil en ekskjæreste ødelegge for ham?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Ex Rated
programme.desc: Ankomsten til to esker opprører huset. Georgie leker med følelsene til Max. Forholdet til Marty og Chloe settes på prøve når Marty avslører sin pikante, lille hemmeligheten.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Actions Speak Louder Than Words
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet skaper kaos på stranden når Stevie får velge hvem som må hjem. Chloe ønsker litt fysisk oppmerksomhet av Sam, og Brads nye kjærlighetsforhold gjør ham overlykkelig.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Fight For Georgia
programme.desc: Forholdet til Chloe og Sam er som en berg-og-dal-bane. Max går lei av Stevie og finner noe morsommere et annet sted. Ankomsten til en ny eks får Georgia og Brad til å spore av.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Marty The Meddler
programme.desc: Klørne kommer frem når gruppen drar på en vill safari og Deans alfahann-status blir truet. Marty blander seg i Chloe og Sams forhold, og John har hendene fulle med Georgia.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Love Is In The Air
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet har en funksjonsfeil og sender Marty på en date med Sam. En nykommer sender tvillingene ut i kamp, mens John og Georgias forhold bare styrker seg.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: #Ballininbalifinale
programme.desc: Bali-strandfesten får en dramatisk slutt når den siste nyankommeren skaper kaos i villaen. Georgia og John klarer ikke det siste hinderet, og Chloe får endelig det hun vil ha av Sam.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Bobby's Dilemma
programme.desc: Den nye kjærlighetsjakten starter på Mexicos strender. Daisy limer seg på Aaron og Essex-gutten Bobby legger an på Rhianne, men vil den første eksen stikke kjepper i hjulene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Datingen fortsetter når Bobby og Bayley drar på 'hjerte til hjerte'-date. Aarons hode blir fordreid, men vil han gå fra Daisy? Tre nyankomne får villaen til å ryste i grunnvollene og noen må dra hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Heartbreak And Happiness
programme.desc: Aaron bryter med Daisy, men kan han vinne Dominikas hjerte? En ny eks ankommer og truer med å ødelegge Bobby og Bayleys forhold.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Departure
programme.desc: Bobbys hjerte knuses av Bayley og Daisy er bare glad for å plukke opp bitene. Aaron fortsetter å ligge etter Dominika og en VIP-ankomst skaper drama i villaen når et par må dra hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Daisy's Disaster
programme.desc: Vil en ny deltager bety lykke for Josiah? Daisy får seg to slag når eksen Matty knuser henne, og vennskapet hennes med jentene trues når han får følelser for Natalee.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Bobby's Revenge
programme.desc: En ny deltager betyr trøbbel for George når Bobby får muligheten til revansje. Natalee vil at Daisy gir tillatelse til en flørt med Matty, og Aaron leker kanskje med ilden på en date for tre.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake! Åtte heite single får snart ødelagt tidenes ferie når en av eksene deres ankommer og ødelegger festen! Hat, krangler, tårer, drama, følelser og enda flere ekser!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: To ekser har ankommet villaen og skaper kaos - og det blir verre. Rogans forhold til Anita kan stå i fare for å ødelegges når eksen Jess ankommer. Mere kjærlighet, mere hat - og framfor alt: flere eks-kjærester!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Tre ekser har ankommet huset og det blir mer og mer spent. Kayleigh får vite at venninnen hennes Loren har kysset eksen hennes Adam, og når to ekser kommer samtidig får vi se et velkjent ansikt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Fem ekser befinner seg i villaen og alle er på tuppa etter at Gaz fra Geordie Shore kom dit. Gary prøver seg på Anita og de faller for hverandre, men eksen som knuste hjertet hennes, dukker opp av havet. Imens har Adam en helt forferdelig dag.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Joes ankomst sjokkerer alle og Anita blir helt ødelagt. Kayleigh lager drama og forteller Joe at Anita har rotet med to av guttene. Neste eks er et velkjent ansikt som kan ødelegge for Gaz og Anita. Velkommen Charlotte!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Jess får høre at Rogan har kysset Megan og hevner seg ved å kysse bestekompisen hans, Morgan. Bromansen ligger på is og villaen er på smeltepunktet. Imens har Adam gått til Charlotte, og hun og Kayleigh krangler, voldsomt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Opp av sjøen kommer et kjent fjes, Ash fra Ex on the Beach første sesong, og han har bare én ting i hodet: Kaos. Alle jentene liker ham, guttene frykter ham. Når Ash velger Anita til privatfesten, bryter helvetet løs og Gary blir helt vill!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Det er nesten over, og noen ekser slutter fred, mens andre aldri vil se hverandre igjen. Gruppen nyter en bankettmiddag, og Anitas utblåsning avslutter alle utblåsninger. Det blir en siste tur på stranden. Hvem er klar for et siste sjokk?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Welcome to Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: 10 reality- og sosiale media-kjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når deres ekser begynner å dukke opp fra stranden for å ødelgge hyggestunden. Tennes det gamle flammer eller åpnes det gamle sår?
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exed Out
programme.desc: En ny eks ankommer med en hemmelighet som ryster hele huset. En av eksene blir stemt av stranda. Par (og tidligere par) møter sine verste mareritt når de må inn i Hemmelighetenes hytte.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tin's Dodge Caravan.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Alex's Chevrolet Chevelle Convertible.
