programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 904
programme.desc: Martin får sin andre vurdering fra legeforeningen, og Buddy forsvinner sporløst. Penhale blir opprørt når hans etterfølger, Mark Mylow, ankommer og prøver å ta over.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 905
programme.desc: Noen har blitt skutt. Penhale starter en etterforskning for å finne gjerningspersonen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 906
programme.desc: Martin og Louisa har sin første fertilitetsavtale, mens Penhale reagerer på et tilfelle av hærverk og får en gratis surfeleksjon.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 907
programme.desc: Fru Tishells unge kusine Sarah Cardy skygger henne på jobb for å få litt arbeidserfaring.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 908
programme.desc: Bryllupsklokkene ringer i Portwenn før Morwenna og Als bryllup. Men noen siste liten problemer truer med spolere dagen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 601
programme.desc: Portwenn er opptatt med å forberede bryllupet til Doc og Louisa. Ruth har problemer med å ta passe på James, og så går strømmen...

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 602
programme.desc: Louisa er tilbake på skolen igjen, og deres nye dagmamma, Mel, er sent ute. Når Mel endelig dukker opp, blir Martin skeptisk til å overlevere barna sine til noen som ikke kan passe tiden.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 603
programme.desc: En fremmed stopper opp når han ser Ruth, og spionerer deretter på henne når hun tar en kaffe med Caroline. Ruth er usikker på hvorfor, men begynner å føle seg ukomfortabel.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 604
programme.desc: Louisa vil at Martin skal bli mer involvert i James, så hun lar ham ta med James til lekegruppen der de må være i samme gruppe som en annen mor og datter og synge sanger.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 605
programme.desc: Fru Tishell vender tilbake til landsbyen. Martin må finne ut hva som er i veien med Lorna. Al og Morwenna har en dårlig date, og kjærligheten blomstrer mellom Bert og Jennifer.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 606
programme.desc: Hypokondrieren Malcolm Rayner sliter med pusten og Martin spør ham om han noen gang har jobbet med asbest.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 607
programme.desc: Al får besøk av to militære politimenn som prøver å spore opp barnevakten James, Mike Pruddy.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 608
programme.desc: Louisa drar til Spania, Bert og Jennifer forlovelsesfest ender med et smell, og Al blir hyllet som en helt for å ha reddet Carolines liv.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 701
programme.desc: Martin vender tilbake til Portwenn, men uten Louisa som har dratt for å bo hos moren sin i Spania.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 702
programme.desc: Louisas retur reiser ytterligere spørsmål om forholdet deres, og kanskje de trenger å tilbringe mer tid fra hverandre.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 703
programme.desc: Etter en ny katastrofe på restauranten hans tar Bert drastiske grep og forsvinner, noe som fører til at Al kontakter P.C. Penhale, selv om han er mer interessert i å flørte med Louisas barnevakt Janice.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin har sin første terapiøkt sammen, og ingen av dem var forberedt på å få hjemmelekser.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 705
programme.desc: Louisa og Morwenna overtaler Martin til å finne et nytt hjem til Buddy. Martin er ikke spesielt imponert over Angelas alternative tilnærming til medisin.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 706
programme.desc: Louisa hjelper ekskjæresten Danny når han tar med seg syv barn fra London for å bo på Ruths gård - overvåket av Al og Bert - mens hun og Martin planlegger en date etter råd fra dr. Timoney.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Sluttspillet
programme.desc: Når Billys far plutselig dør av et massivt hjerteinfarkt, forsøker storesøsteren hans å overbevise ham om at faren faktisk elsket ham.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Testen
programme.desc: Når en ekskjæreste besøker Jake for å fortelle ham at hun har AIDS, får Jake panikk, og han informerer Jo så de begge kan teste seg.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Presse grensene
programme.desc: Billy blir forfremmet i bladet og tror sjefen er ute etter å ta ham. I mellomtiden gjør Amanda livet surt for Alison.

programme.title: Melrose Place: En dans for tre
programme.desc: Under Lucys forlovelsesfest på kontoret, iakttar Alison at Amanda flørter med Billy, og hun begynner å lure på hva hun faktisk føler for ham.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Grip dagen
programme.desc: Lucy inviterer Alison til Palm Springs på en firmatur. Der prøver Billy å ende deres platonske forhold med en het natt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Stort behov
programme.desc: Billy får vite at Amanda venter hans barn og slites mellom ansvarsfølelsen og følelsene for Alison.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mistenkelige sinn (90 minutter)
programme.desc: Amandas forestående forfremmelse som den neste visedirektøren for D&D etter Lucy, står i fare på grunn av graviditeten -- inntil hun har en spontanabort.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mye larm for ingenting
programme.desc: Amanda holder en fest for å feire kjøpet av Melrose-bygningen og flytter inn i Rhondas tomme leilighet etter at hun flytter ut.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Lang natts reise
programme.desc: Alison nekter å tro Billys mistanker om at Keith er forfølgeren hennes. Men når hun går til Keiths rom for å ta farvel, blir han voldelig.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hevn
programme.desc: A revenge-seeking Billy tracks Keith to Seattle and warns him to leave Alison alone. After Billy leaves, Keith makes a drastic decision.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ildkraft
programme.desc: Jakes motorsykkelverksted brenner ned mens han er ute med Amanda, og både forsikringsselskapet og Jo mener brannen er mistenkelig.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Om sykler og menn
programme.desc: When Jake realizes that he accidentally caused the fire, he gets upset and trashes Jo's apartment, forcing her to ask him to move out.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Oppglødd
programme.desc: Jake flytter inn i sin gamle leilighet, og Billy og Alison prøver å føre ham og Jo sammen igjen. Senere oppstår det konflikter mellom Jake, Jo og Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Farlig flørt
programme.desc: Alison reiser for å møte en tilbaketrukket entreprenør. Jane forsikrer Robert om at hun elsker ham og kaster Sydney ut av leiligheten.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Intet rosebed
programme.desc: Alison føler seg tiltrukket av Steve når han ankommer Los Angeles, og Billy blir sjalu på all tiden hun og Steve tilbringer sammen.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Gift med det
programme.desc: Kimberly oppdager Michaels affære med Sydney når hun overrasker dem i sengen. Hun gjør det slutt med Michael og forteller Jane om det.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Flokete vev
programme.desc: Billy, Alison og Jo besøker Steves ranch, der Jo forteller Steve at hun vil roe ned forholdet deres fordi hun ennå har følelser for Jake.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Kollisjonskurs
programme.desc: Michael og Kimberly forsones, og hun sier ja til frieriet hans. Men de havner i en alvorlig bilulykke og havner begge på sykehus.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Glemte folk
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette overtaler CD til å gå undercover i et rekonvalenshjem etter at en beboer som er en gammel venn av Trivette, dør på mystisk vis.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Den siste av sitt slag, del 1
programme.desc: Når Walker finner dagboken til den legendariske Texas Ranger Hayes Cooper, som er fra 1800-tallet, får han vite hvordan Cooper gikk fra å være dusørjeger til å bli ranger, og hvordan denne modige mannen jaget en gjeng drapsmenn og reddet en småby.
programme.sub-title: Den siste av sitt slag, del 1

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Den siste av sitt slag, del 2
programme.desc: Når han oppdager at hans gode venner har blitt drept fordi de nektet å gi fra seg gården til eiendomsbaron Bedoe, blir Hayes Cooper med rangerne og går etter de som stod bak dødsfallene.
programme.sub-title: Den siste av sitt slag, del 2

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vidunderbarn
programme.desc: Et ungt geni med psykokinesiske evner, som har blitt venner med Walker via nettet, ber om rangerens hjelp når han mistenker at moren, som er død ifølge hans foresatte, kanskje lever.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rettferdighetens mann
programme.desc: Etter å ha bedt delstaten om ikke å avskrive en gruppe unge kriminelle, setter Walker i gang et intensivt og intenst seksukers-kurs for å prøve å rehabilitere forbryterne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Regnbuens ende
programme.desc: Walker aner ugler i mosen når, bare timer etter å ha vunnet et løp, en prisvinnende hest, dens eier og trener blir funnet døde.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En kvinnes plass
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber på byggeplassen hvor det bygges nye boliger for folk med lav inntekt, blir Alex' venn Alfre drapstruet når hun truer med å avsløre farlige brudd på bygningsforskriftene.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Små velsignelser
programme.desc: Walker slår seg sammen med sin venn Soldier og hunden hans, Lucky, for å finne et foreldreløst søskenpar som blir jaktet på av nådeløse kriminelle etter at barna så dem drepe noen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Stamme
programme.desc: Arkeolog Nora Shannon blir drept mens hun leder en utgraving på cherokee-området hvor Walkers venn Sam Coyote er sjef for reservatpolitiet, og Sam, som har gjort kur til Nora, blir hovedmistenkt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Se i nåde
programme.desc: Walker får nok å gjøre når fanger på rømmen tar to nonner som gisler samt Alex og en gruppe voldsutsatte kvinner, og truer med å drepe dem om de ikke får kravene sine oppfylt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Pengenes makt
programme.desc: For å avverge en mulig gisselsituasjon, leder CD vaktholdet og Walker og Alex går undercover som mann og kone på et eksklusivt feriested, hvis gjester er noen av verdens rikeste menn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Korsfarer
programme.desc: Når ekskona til en syk profesjonell bryter går i dekning etter å ha vært vitne til et brutalt drap, må bryteren ta seg av sin sønn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: I Guds hender
programme.desc: Trivette tror han er ansvarlig for å ha skutt en seks år gammel gutt ved et uhell, og blir suspendert mens etterforskningen pågår.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Undercover
programme.desc: Walker og Trent Malloy frykter for livet til deres gode venn, etterforsker Carlos Sandoval, når han går undercover som narkolanger og lederne for narkooperasjonen avslører hvem han er.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Hverdagshelter
programme.desc: Når en skambanket kvinne gir myndighetene informasjon om ektemannens narkotikafremstilling, må Walker beskytte henne fra ektemannens vrede.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigere
programme.desc: En bioingeniør, som har oppdaget et avansert DNA som kan sette en stopper for alle genetiske sykdommer, blir kidnappet av medlemmer av et nådeløst komplott.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Angel
programme.desc: Ranger Trivette gjenopptar forholdet til en tidligere flamme, Angel, men finner ut at hun nå er en profesjonell leiemorder som har satt ham i stor fare.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vinterens sjel
programme.desc: Walker er fast bestemt på å felle Sons of the Reich, en hvitmaktgruppe han tror står bak drapet på en ung gutt foran vennens kirke, noe som skapte stor frykt i nabolaget.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Livets sirkel
programme.desc: Walker etterforsker en rekke ran som leder ham til en overgangsbolig for straffedømte som er ute på prøve, og en av dem viser seg å være ektemannen til en nær venn.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Eks-agenten Bryan Mills er forsont med sin tidligere kone, men lykken blir kortvarig når hun brutalt myrdes og han blir beskyldt for udåden.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Den pensjonerte CIA-agenten Robert legger ut på en dristig redningsaksjon av erkefiendens enke, Sasha. Men snart blir Robert konfrontert med et kjent ansikt han trodde han aldri ville se igjen...

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Når en amerikansk by blir invadert av nordkoreanske soldater, kommer en gruppe unge mennesker sammen for å beskytte hverandre, frigjøre byen og gjenvinne sin frihet.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Den tidligere agenten Bryan Mills begynner de lengste 96 timene i sitt liv når han tar opp jakten på mennene som kidnappet datteren hans.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Josie vender tilbake til den lille hjembyen sin da hun uventet blir verge for niesen og nevøen sin. Der møter hun Cooper, kjæresten fra high school.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: Etter angrepene på World Trade Center og Pentagon utnevner kongressen advokaten Kenneth Feinberg til å lede erstatningsfondet for ofrene. Feinberg står overfor en umulig oppgave - å bestemme hvor mye et liv er verdt.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: 16-år gamle Megan Walsh er i trening for å bli en iskald internasjonal leiemorder, men i hemmelighet lengter hun etter å være en normal tenåring. Hun forfalsker derfor sin egen død.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: En eventplanlegger finner kjærligheten mens hun jobber med å arrangere det siste bryllupet på en historisk taverna.

programme.title: Wildfire: The More Things Change: Part 2
programme.desc: After Kris unexpectedly returns for a glimpse of Wildfire's next race, she gains an unlikely ally and a place to stay.

programme.title: Wildfire: Calm
programme.desc: Jean and Pablo are adamant that Kris leave town instead of sticking around and helping to care for Wildfire.

programme.title: Wildfire: Flames
programme.desc: Kris and Junior help Matt with his improbable plan to get Raintree back in the horse-racing business, which involves finding Wildfire's offspring, Flame.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Friend
programme.desc: Junior's preoccupation with his and Calvin's business proposition takes time away from his wedding plans, but Laura suspects his loss of focus may have something to do with Kris.

programme.title: Wildfire: Friendship/Passion
programme.desc: The pressure is on Junior to decide whether or not to go through with his wedding to Laura after he and Kris share a moment of passion.

programme.title: Wildfire: Commitment Issues
programme.desc: When it appears that Flame is ready for his first race, Kris decides to fight to get her jockey's license reinstated.

programme.title: Wildfire: Life's Too Short
programme.desc: Kris hopes that Flame's success in the DuPont Stakes might help Jean change her mind about Raintree's future, but Kris isn't so sure about what part---if any---she'll play in it.

programme.title: Wildfire: Vows
programme.desc: Kris and Junior hastily decide to get married, but they're forced to postpone their plans when Jean is injured by one of the horses rescued by Matt.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Comeback
programme.desc: With Jean still out of commission, Kris and Matt do their best to run the dude ranch at Raintree while also preparing for the next race, which features Dani's new horse in the field

programme.title: Wildfire: Being Mrs. Junior
programme.desc: Universal disapproval of Kris and Junior's wedding plans has everyone on edge, and even Kris wonders if she has what it takes to be part of the Davis family.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Ties That Bind: Part 1
programme.desc: Kris and Junior consider a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to relocate to Alaska for a year to work on a geothermal project in the series' penultimate episode.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Ties That Bind: Part 2
programme.desc: In the series finale, Junior's schedule goes haywire when an urgent matter in Alaska that requires his attention coincides with Kris'ride on Wildfire in the Tucker Stakes and their wedding.

programme.title: Wildfire: Pilot
programme.desc: Kris Furillo is released from the juvenile detention center and begins working at the Ritter family ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Rescue
programme.desc: Kris Furillo is released from the juvenile detention center and begins working at the Ritter family ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: Trust
programme.desc: Kris returns to Raintree Ranch after ninety days at Camp Lagrange and begins the healing process.

programme.title: Wildfire: Mothers
programme.desc: Kris' mother Barb pays an unexpected visit to Raintree.

programme.title: Wildfire: Guilty
programme.desc: Kris feels responsible when Oklahoma Crude is injured during a work out race with Wildfire so she gets a job at a local diner to help out, although it might not be enough.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Claiming Race
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a high stakes horse race, Kris falls for Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Kris and her companions track lost horses in the woods while the Ritter family grows emotionally.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Track
programme.desc: Kris investigates the seamy underworld of the race track after Wildfire comes down with colic.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: On the Case: Stabbed in the Heart
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four is stabbed to death in her bathroom. A mysterious v shaped wound on her forehead finally leads police to her killer decades later.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Fire
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a raging house fire they discover the blaze was just the cover up for a vicious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: A Betrayal Concealed
programme.desc: A 17-year-old's shocking murder shatters the peace in a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case: Scent of a Killer
programme.desc: The investigation into Sandra Iverson's stabbing death goes cold until a police canine team uncovers a trail leading them to an unlikely young suspect.

programme.title: On the Case: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is murdered the evidence points detectives to a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case: The Answer Was No
programme.desc: Police try to retrace a young mother's last known movements in an attempt to solve her mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Tip 1960
programme.desc: 19 year old Katie Poirier was working the night shift at a Convenience store when she was violently kidnapped. The abduction was captured on videotape but the images were not clear enough to identify her attacker.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: The Doorbell Rang
programme.desc: The ring of a doorbell overheard during a teenager's final telephone call may be the key to solving her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Call
programme.desc: When bartender Anita Andrews is stabbed to death inside her family's bar, police conclude her killer was the last patron she served that night.

programme.title: On the Case: Deep Wounds
programme.desc: After Navy electrician Michael Jacobs comes home to find his wife, Suzanne, and his three-year-old son, Colin, murdered, San Diego police race to catch a serial killer who leaves behind an unimaginable calling card.

programme.title: On the Case: Lost In The Fire
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother of two is found shot to death in her fire-ravaged home, police find there are more suspects than clues.

programme.title: On the Case: Predator on the Loose
programme.desc: A deadly predator haunts the city of Stockton, California and becomes more and more violent.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery In The Desert
programme.desc: When an innocent couple is murdered execution-style in the Arizona desert it marks the beginning of a 50-year search for the truth. Who really killed them and why? After decades of investigation, the controversial case remains shrouded in mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Snapshot to Murder
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes into thin air during a day studying in the park. Will a photograph from a nearby celebration help solve the case?

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Silence
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman never returns home after a night out with friends, and the police come up against a wall of silence that keeps them from uncovering the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: A Window to Murder
programme.desc: A valiant teenager's dying act helps police solve the mystery behind her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 2
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On the Case.

programme.title: On the Case: This is for Her
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion leaves a father of three dead. Why was the victim's wife, the only eyewitness to the crime left alive?

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes in the space of a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Just months from retiring, Electra captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Over Seas
programme.desc: Buffalo has to get a CL-215 water bomber to buyers in Korea. So Justin and Cory fly the plane to Vancouver Harbour, where it will be hoisted onto a cargo ship sailing across the Pacific Ocean to its destination a method of delivery no one has ever tried.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to new buyers there. But the boys are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Snowplane
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Årets Bästa Drevjakt - 16 Vilt!
programme.desc: Jompen & Danne beger sig till Sörmland för två dagars drevjakt. Resultatet blir minst sagt något utöver det vanliga!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompen Och Danne På Skoveljakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Danne är och jagar skovel i Sörmland. Det blir en episk film och en mycket lyckad jakt för båda två.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kattis Jagar Vildsvin & Toppfågel
programme.desc: Äntligen är Kattis tillbaka i rutan! Vi får följa med på en händelserik drevjakt med mängder av vildsvin. Inte nog med det så blir det jakt med ställande hund på Vildsvin!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt på kronhjort
programme.desc: Drevjakt och hundförare hos Simon. Massa vildsvin & kronhjort på marken!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pyrschjakt
programme.desc: Jompen smyger runt i ekbackar på jakt efter dovhjort

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skyttetävling & Radiogrisen 2.0
programme.desc: Sako & Varpsund bjuder in till skyttetävling där Jakt är Jakt ställs mot Side by Side och Shots & Pots!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Kapital Kronhjort & En Liten Gåsjakt
programme.desc: Pierre ger sig ut på jakt efter kronhjort. Det blir en spännande jakt med ett vackert avslut!
programme.sub-title: Jakt På Kapital Kronhjort & En Liten Gåsjakt

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Nya Jägare
programme.desc: Danne är bjuden på en drevjakt som Sveaskog håller i samarbete med jägareförbundet, där nyexaminerade jägare för testa på att jaga. Lärorikt och spännande situationer i veckans drevjakt!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Gäddjakt I Roslagen & Jakt På Vildren
programme.desc: Jompen ger sig ut på en ny slags jakt i Roslagen.
programme.sub-title: Gäddjakt I Roslagen & Jakt På Vildren

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt Och Skogslära
programme.desc: Jompen beger sig till Götaland för att jaga och besöka Anna Stridsman, skogsvårdschef på Svea Skog, för att lära sig om betesskador och sättet markägare ser på jakten.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Foderplats
programme.desc: Jompen bygger sin första foderplats för att locka vildsvinen från åkrarna.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pierre Skjuter 4 Vildsvin
programme.desc: Under vår och tidig sommar jagar Pierre väldigt mycket vildsvin i spannmålen, i det här avsnittet tar han med oss på en samling spännande jakter han har varit med om.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Ringduva
programme.desc: Lubbe jagar ringduva i Uppland helt ensam. Trodde han tills filmteamet dök upp.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompens Första Drevjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe tar med Jompen på hans första drevjakt. Det sprutar vildsvin ur varenda buske, men Jompen har tankarna på annat håll.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bockpremiären
programme.desc: 16 Augusti, Bockpremiär. Självklart beger vi oss till Blommeröd för att ta del av magiska jaktupplevelser och kulinariska mästerverk av Carl Dreyer.

programme.title: Vilterian: Burgare & Rygg
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt besöker Jompen Kim Nyström på Slottsholmen där det bjuds på vildsvinsburgare och en svårfångad förrätt.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Klappjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen är i Östergötland på klappjakt. Vildsvin, Rådjur och slow motion står på menyn.

programme.title: Vilterian: Höstgryta
programme.desc: Kim och Jompen lagar en delikat viltgryta på hotell Slottsholmen i Västervik. Ännu ett avsnitt med fantastiskt god mat gjord från naturens godaste och bästa råvara - viltkött!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vildsvinsteori
programme.desc: Mats lär Jompen allt han kan om skyddsjakt och hur man pratar med älgar.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bockjakt Och Skyttetips Vid Smygjakt & Älgpremiär
programme.desc: Bockjakt & skyttetips vid smygjakt. Pierre pratar om det avgörande ögonblicket under jakt - skottet och sedan jagar han rådjur med lockpipa.
programme.sub-title: Bockjakt Och Skyttetips Vid Smygjakt & Älgpremiär

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Sista Älgjakten
programme.desc: En fantastisk tredagars älgjakt i vintermiljö med Jompen. Kattis och Danne ansluter även sista dagen. Det blir säsongens sista älgjakt, missa inte!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hummerfiske Och Matlagning
programme.desc: Jompen, Calle och Danne är i Torekov för att fiska hummer och makrill. Danne får strafflotten och beger sig på en annan typ av jakt. Allt jagat hamnar på grillen under Calles magiska hand.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skarvjakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Anders beger sig ut i roslagens skärgård på skarvjakt! Syftet med denna jaktformen så här års är att freda Abborren. Häng med på ett grymt roligt äventyr med massa pangpang!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Drevjakt
programme.desc: Jompen är ute på en minst sagt händelserik drevjakt på Vibyholm i Sörmland. Massa vilt, missa inte!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Nyårsspecial
programme.desc: Sista avsnittet år 2020 och det firar Jompen hos Calle Dreyer nere i Blommeröd. Videon slutar med lite fina klipp från våra filmer i 2020 och en hälsning från alla oss!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Smygjakt På Svart Dovhjort & Vildsvinsjakt Med Ställande Hundar
programme.desc: Jompen & Anders är bjudna på en väldigt spännande smygjakt på Åda! En av sveriges viltrikaste marker när det kommer till dovhjort!
programme.sub-title: Smygjakt På Svart Dovhjort & Vildsvinsjakt Med Ställande Hundar

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Småland Drevjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen är i Småland på drevjakt. Förmiddagen och dagen blir inte riktigt som dom planerat...

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hageljakt På Rådjur Med Drever
programme.desc: Jompen, Danne & Tottie är bjudna på en traditionell hageljakt med Drever.

programme.title: Vilterian: Ribs
programme.desc: Grillade vildsvinsribs med hemgjord BBQ-sås på grillade frukter och grönsaker med en sallad på spetskål, äpplen, ingefära och citron

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drömskoveln
programme.desc: Pierre smyger efter dovhjort i Östergötland. Dag 2 ser han ett par dovskovlar. Efter en lyckad jakt tillagar han en smarrig lunch i skogen.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skytteträning
programme.desc: Säsongen är igång och det är viktigare än nånsin att skyttet ligger på topp. Enjoy!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown, Beauty In A Box, Halloween Tablescapes with Darcy Miller
programme.desc: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown joins Drew. In Beauty in A Box, Drew surprises a viewer at home who is need of a quick makeup routine. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares Halloween tablescapes to help your family celebrate the holiday this year.
programme.sub-title: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown, Beauty In A Box, Halloween Tablescapes with Darcy Miller

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender
programme.desc: Seth MacFarlane and Liz Gillies on their new album. Drew surprises Andi & Thomas Bonura, parents of three, who adopted five siblings after hearing they were separated in different foster homes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”
programme.sub-title: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off her week-long Halloween celebration with Netflix’s “Hubie Halloween” star Adam Sandler. Then, actress Jill Kargman and Drew visit Pumpkin Blaze Long Island! Plus, Drew tackles dating at any age in her signature “Love Bug” segment.
programme.sub-title: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Witches" Star Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Star Noah Schnapp
programme.desc: Drew continues the week-long Halloween celebration with "The Witches" star Stanley Tucci. Leo Kelly joins to make a mocktail. "Hubie Halloween" star Noah Schnapp stops by to chat. Plus, Design by Drew Scarrymore and the Drew Scarrymore Costume Challenge.
programme.sub-title: "The Witches" Star Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Star Noah Schnapp

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour, First Date After Divorce
programme.desc: It’s Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour! Drew helps a viewer get ready for her first date since her divorce. New foods with Eitan Bernath. Then, we follow a couple as they go sky diving for the first time! Plus bonus moments with actress Charlize Theron.
programme.sub-title: Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour, First Date After Divorce

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Phil, "Hubie Halloween" Star China Anne McClain, Drew’s News with Ross Matthews
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shares why it was important for him to produce his new docuseries "That Animal Rescue Show." Then, Halloween week continues with "Hubie Halloween" star China Anne McClain. Plus, Drew’s News with special guest Ross Matthews.
programme.sub-title: Dr. Phil, "Hubie Halloween" Star China Anne McClain, Drew’s News with Ross Matthews

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Anne Hathaway, "The Daily Show’s” Dulce Sloan
programme.desc: Week-long Halloween celebration w/ "The Witches" star Anne Hathaway. "The Daily Show's" Dulce Sloan introduces some single men & their furry sidekicks! Drew goes down to the basement of the CBS Studios with ghosthunter Steve Gonsalves to hunt for ghosts!
programme.sub-title: Anne Hathaway, "The Daily Show’s” Dulce Sloan

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Halloween Show! "Emily in Paris" Star Ashley Park
programme.desc: Drew’s Halloween show! "Emily in Paris's" Ashley Park stops by. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares tips to repurpose leftover Halloween candy. Drew's "Stans for Stains: Halloween Edition." A curated list of Drew's favorites in "The Weekender."
programme.sub-title: Drew’s Halloween Show! "Emily in Paris" Star Ashley Park

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jessica Capshaw, Rage Baking
programme.desc: Netflix’s "Holidate" star Jessica Capshaw stops by to chat. Then, Drew enlists finance expert Farnoosh Torabi and psychologist Dr. Aliza Pressman who share tips on how to talk to your kids about money. Drew and Ross Matthews try-out "Rage Baking."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Actress Annaleigh Ashford, Olympic Snowboarder Jamie Anderson
programme.desc: Actress Annaleigh Ashford chats. Drew has a big surprise for nurse Gina Goodwin, who cooks and delivers hundreds of meals every Thanksgiving. Olympic snowboarder Jamie Anderson shares her winter skin routine. Drew reads letters in "Dear Drew."
programme.sub-title: Actress Annaleigh Ashford, Olympic Snowboarder Jamie Anderson

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Youtube Star David Dobrik, Comedian Fortune Feimster, Beauty Backgrounder
programme.desc: David Dobrik on amassing over 15 million YouTube subscribers and the Vlog Squad. Comedian Fortune Feimster stops by. in Beauty Backgrounder, Drew does a deep-dive into the history of iconic beauty looks and shares tips for perfecting the timeless look.
programme.sub-title: Youtube Star David Dobrik, Comedian Fortune Feimster, Beauty Backgrounder

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Comedian Gabriel Iglesias, "Friendsgiving" Cast
programme.desc: Host of Nickelodeon’s new animal talent show "Unleashed" comedian Gabriel Iglesias shares with Drew one of his favorite acts. Cast of the new film "Friendsgiving" including Malin Akerman, Kat Dennings, Aisha Tyler and Chelsea Peretti stop by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Wildflower: Model Winnie Harlow, Mom’s Time Out
programme.desc: Drew spotlights women in signature "Wildflower." Laura Sobiech and Director Justin Baldoni discuss her son Zach’s battle with cancer inspiring a number one song. In "Mom’s Time Out," Drew surprises one deserving mom with an all-expenses paid vacation!
programme.sub-title: Wildflower: Model Winnie Harlow, Mom’s Time Out

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Craft Week with Zooey Deschanel, Dumplings with Wilson Tang
programme.desc: Drew is sharing DIY crafts all week-long, kicking it off with actress Zooey Deschanel. Then, Drew learns how to make dumplings with Wilson Tang. Supermodel Karolina Kurkova joins Drew at the Drew’s News desk to discuss her line of sustainable masks.
programme.sub-title: Craft Week with Zooey Deschanel, Dumplings with Wilson Tang

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: John Boyega, Drew's News, In A Minute with Bill Nye 60 Second Experiment
programme.desc: "The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.
programme.sub-title: John Boyega, Drew's News, In A Minute with Bill Nye 60 Second Experiment

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bill Nye, Pilar's Pantry Party, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast Sneak Peak
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.
programme.sub-title: Bill Nye, Pilar's Pantry Party, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast Sneak Peak

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Regina Hall, Drew's News, In a Minute Raffle
programme.desc: "Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!
programme.sub-title: Regina Hall, Drew's News, In a Minute Raffle

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Cameron Diaz, Leftovers Makeover with Pilar, In a Minute with Pilar
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!
programme.sub-title: Cameron Diaz, Leftovers Makeover with Pilar, In a Minute with Pilar

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew Gooder, Drew's News
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Food News, Biggest Design Dilemmas with Mikel Welch
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!
programme.sub-title: Drew's News: Food News, Biggest Design Dilemmas with Mikel Welch

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition, Mac N Cheese Cook Off
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!
programme.sub-title: Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition, Mac N Cheese Cook Off

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Celeste Barber, Danny Seo
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Health & Wellness Edition, Eyebrow Makeovers
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews cover woman's library wellness check & how cuddling helps health. 2 guests get eyebrow makeover tips while Danny Seo shares paper recycling tip on Drew's News.
programme.sub-title: Drew's News: Health & Wellness Edition, Eyebrow Makeovers

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Susan Sarandon, Drew's News
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News Beauty News with Zanna Roberts Rassi, Drew-Gooder Makeover
programme.desc: Drew and Ross are joined by beauty guru Zanna Roberts Rassi at the news desk to break down the latest beauty headlines. Then, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Zanna transforms a busy mom of two and special needs teacher.
programme.sub-title: Drew's News Beauty News with Zanna Roberts Rassi, Drew-Gooder Makeover

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Abbi Jacobson
programme.desc: "A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more!

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle har det perfekte oppsettet: en bra jobb, en fin kjæreste og et drømmeliv. Men etter å ha adoptert en liten valp, snus livet hennes på hodet og bare litt julemagi kan fikse det.

programme.title: Christmas Unfiltered
programme.desc: På julaften ønsker Becky at familien hennes virkelig skal høre henne. Alle tankene og frustrasjonene hennes renner ut når hun uforvarende begynner å fortelle alle hva hun egentlig tenker.

programme.title: Christmas on Candy Cane Lane
programme.desc: Ivy balanserer ferieforpliktelser, datteren og motstridende følelser til eksmannen, alt samtidig med at en mystisk skøyer skaper rabalder i Candy Cane Lane.

programme.title: On the Twelfth Day of Christmas
programme.desc: Maggie blir overlykkelig når hun finner ut at hennes gamle kjæreste skal flytte tilbake til byen der hun bor.

programme.title: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Tom hjelper klientene sine med å finne den perfekte gaven. Etter hvert som Tom blir bedre kjent med Jenny, blir ting komplisert når han innser at han forelsker seg i vennens kjæreste.

programme.title: A Christmas Star
programme.desc: En astronom spår at et nytt meteorregn vil dukke opp over en liten by, men hun må overbevise lokalbefolkningen om å hjelpe til med oppdagelsen hennes på bekostning av en juletradisjon.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas
programme.desc: Brookfield er valgt av et nasjonalt magasin til å bli omtalt for sin juleånd, og innbyggerne slår seg sammen for å gjøre samfunnet deres til et jule-eventyrland.

programme.title: Hotel for the Holidays
programme.desc: Samtidig som hotelldirektøren Georgia navigerer i romantiske forviklinger med kokken og en kjekk prins, får vi et innblikk i livet til andre gjester og ansatte.

programme.title: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Etter at Saras idé blir stjålet, ønsker hun at hun våget å stå opp for seg selv. Julenissen innvilger henne dette, men gir henne 48 timer på å lære seg å uttrykke sin mening.

programme.title: Christmas in Pine Valley
programme.desc: Natalie eier et såpefirma som hun driver med vennene sine. En dag sender et stort magasin en reporter for å skrive en artikkel om selskapet til Natalie, i troen på at det er en familiebedrift.

programme.title: Much Ado About Christmas
programme.desc: Etter at Haley Lloyd har blitt dumpet av utallige friere, er det forfriskende når Claud faller for henne, uvitende om hennes sanne identitet. Men når den sannheten kommer frem, setter den romantikken i fare.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci er i tvil om Kyle er klar til å være en del av Bentleys liv. Farrah prøver speeddating. Amber forbereder seg til eksamen, men med en baby er det vanskeligere enn ventet. Retten sender Catelynn stefar på avrusing.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.
programme.sub-title: You Can't Just Be With Me?

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.
programme.sub-title: Love is Not a Maybe Thing

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Destiny's Child, Taylor Hawkins, P.O.D.
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of P.O.D., Destiny's Child and Taylor Hawkins with Chad Smith.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Snoop Dogg, Jeremy Popoff, Silkk The Shocker
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Snoop Dogg, LIT and Silkk the Shocker.
programme.sub-title: Snoop Dogg, Jeremy Popoff, Silkk The Shocker

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Pamela Anderson, K - CI, Jojo
programme.desc: Starting in sunny Southern California, Cribs pays a visit to Pamela Anderson's spectacular beach-front home.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Moby, Xzibit, Brett Michaels
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Moby, Bret Michaels and Xzibit.

programme.title: Made: Mixed Martial Artists
programme.desc: Sabrina and Jenna are best friends and the biggest girly girls in their school. They want to shed their spoiled images and be MADE into tough, disciplined Mixed Martial Artists.

programme.title: Made: Boxer
programme.desc: Cheerleading princess Erin wants to get tough by becoming a burley boxer. Can boxing trainer Kenny Porter get Erin ready to fight in the showcase of the stars in just 5 weeks?

programme.title: Made: Rockstar
programme.desc: Obsessively organized Jessica wants to show that she can let loose by being MADE into a rockstar.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Jacqueline and Lauren are really close friends, and have their joint party at The Hard Rock Cafe. Will their over-the-top party live up to the expectations of them and their hundreds of guests?

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Ava has a taste for the finer things in life. Only the best of the best will do for her Arabian Night Sweet 16.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Natalie's just moved from sleepy Roswell. This new girl figures planning the biggest bash LA Jolla has ever seen will put her on the map with the kids at school.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Sierra (daughter singer/producer of Cee-Lo) is a little diva who wants what she wants, which includes having a Sweet 15 party so she can be the first among her friends to celebrate their coming of age.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Mandy Moore, Eliza Dushku, Todd Oldham, Oscar de la Joya, Ashton Kutcher
programme.desc: Eliza Dushku is mistaken for a shoplifter. Mandy Moore & Todd Oldham do a little bit of crib crashing - literally! Oscar De La Hoya steps into the ring for some Punk'd style rounds.
programme.sub-title: Mandy Moore, Eliza Dushku, Todd Oldham, Oscar de la Joya, Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is tormented by a naked shopper, thinking that the SUV belongs to Ashton, a jealous boyfriend in a love triangle feud destroys Wilmer Valderrama's SUV and Tom Arnold drops off his brat kid with Ashton's newly hired assistant.
programme.sub-title: Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Kevin Richardson (Backstreet Boys), Seth Greene
programme.desc: The Backstreet Boys' Kevin & Trishelle from Real World Las Vegas get caught in building security. Seth Green gets stung when Ashton's celeb craps game gets raided. Punk'd takes over a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey
programme.desc: Charges are threatened on unsuspecting Jessica Biel when she agrees to watch a fan's kid, Jessica Simpson's long-lost relatives show up on her doorstep asking for money and customers are treated badly by valets when they come to pick up their cars.
programme.sub-title: Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan O'Malley
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel viser sinnssykt morsomme Redneck Good Times, Nutflix og Double Whammies. Ryan O'Malley, hoppestokkmester, viser frem sportens gode og dårlige sider, og du får se hvorfor du aldri bør snu ryggen til en lama!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Knoxville
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville hjelper Rob med å presentere Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts og Poorly Placed Kid, og du får vite hvorfor fugler aldri er dine venner, spesielt ikke om de har nebb lange nok til å nå hjernen din gjennom nesa!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black
programme.desc: Robs tidligere medspiller Big Black slutter seg til panelet og ser på Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair og Coming in Hot. Se hvordan menneske-skorpioner stikker på en helt annen måte enn edderkoppen som angriper en uskyldig far.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travis Pastrana
programme.desc: Motorsportsstjernen Travis Pastrana hjelper Rob med å presentere Poorly Placed Trees og Whiskey Throttles. Rob viser deg Pastranabees og Animals Being Human, og du får sjansen til å eksplodere av latter av Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.
programme.sub-title: Should I Stay or Should I Go?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dark Side of the Mesa
programme.desc: A report about the 2004 conviction of Michael Blagg for the murder of his wife and daughter. Blagg has steadfastly maintained his innocence and in 2014, in a bombshell decision, the conviction was overturned and a new trial began in 2018.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in Apartment 4C?
programme.desc: A report on the 2016 disappearance and murder of Joey Comunale after a night of partying in New York City. While out clubbing, Comunale accepted an invitation to a party at a Sutton Place apartment with people he had just met.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Remembering the Chowchilla Kidnapping
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lina's Heart
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Death of an Officer's Wife
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Death of an Officer's Wife

programme.title: 48 Hours: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Toxic
programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: An investigation into the life of NBA superstar Lorenzen Wright, a hometown hero to many in Memphis, Tennessee and the circumstances of his 2010 murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Pact
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old John McCabe of Tewksbury, Massachusetts, who was murdered after a dance in 1969, and his family's decades-long quest to find out what really happened to him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghost of David Coffin
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Krystal's Courage
programme.desc: 10-year-old Krystal Surles and her friend Kaylene Harris were attacked in Kaylene’s home by an intruder who slashed both girls’ throats. Kaylene died. Krystal not only survived but was able to help police, leading to the arrest of her attacker.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hit
programme.desc: A report on the death of colorful entrepreneur and Las Vegas gambler Gary Triano, who was blown up in his car after finishing a round of golf at the exclusive La Paloma Country Club in Tucson, Arizona in 1996.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: A report about Danroy "DJ" Henry and the dedication and struggles his family endured while trying to restore their son's reputation after he was shot dead in Pleasantville, New York, by police officer Aaron Hess in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In September 2005, 17-year-old Taylor Behl, a Virginia Commonwealth University freshman, disappeared from campus. A police investigation eventually uncovered her association with Ben Fawley, a 38-year-old man who confessed to having sex with Taylor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: West Memphis 3: Free
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Joanne Witt was stabbed to death while she was sleeping on Thursday, June 11, 2009. One month prior to her death Joanne found her 14-year-old daughter Tylar Witt in a compromising situation with 19-year-old Stephen Colver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery on Twin Peaks Drive
programme.desc: A report on the December 16, 1998 death of Ronda Reynolds, whose husband found her lifeless body with a gunshot wound to the head in her home on Twin Peaks Drive in Toledo, Washington.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: An examination of the 2016 case of wealthy lawyer Tex McIver, who shot his wife Diane McIver from the backseat of a car while their friend drove them home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: World Chase Tag USA 2020
programme.desc: Segui gli emozionanti match di World Chase Tag, il campionato internazionale di parkour competitivo che prevede il gioco dell'acchiapparella.

programme.title: Danish Fight Night: København - Januar 2024
programme.desc: Danish Fight Night fra Royal Arena i København d. 13. januar 2024 med bl.a. Oskar Sønnichsen, David Farah Bakhash, Silas Yde og Tobias Michelsen.

programme.title: Danish Fight Night: København - Januar 2024

programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.
