programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation
programme.desc: The duo goes to rock concert / Beavis and Butt-Head breaks into Stewarts house to watch TV / A bomb threat is called into their high school
programme.sub-title: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.
programme.sub-title: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Welcome to Valley Ranch
programme.desc: Når treningsleiren åpner med 43 kvinner, blir presset stort! Kellis entusiasme er smittsom, men det første møtet er også opprørende. Forventningene er skyhøye. Syv jenter må eliminieres for at troppen skal bestå av 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Week Of Firsts
programme.desc: Frykt griper treningsleirkandidatene når de innser at de må klare DCCs benspark og hoppspagat for første gang. Å lande så unaturlig krever stor tro på seg selv.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Getting The DCC Look
programme.desc: For å være en DCC må man se ut som en DCC. Denne uken skal Kelli sørge for at alle jentene har den rette looken. De begynner med en makeover og jentene drar til snobbete Halcyon Salon for å få nye frisyrer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time To Get Serious
programme.desc: Kandidatene starter sin sjette uke og de må begynne å se ut som DCC, eller så kan de risikere å miste plassene sine. Melissa Rycroft og tidligere DCC Tina Kalina vikarierer for Judy og Kelli for å se kandidatene med nye øyne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Lucid Dream
programme.desc: Det er tre jenter igjen å sende hjem og den første kampen er rett rundt hjørnet, så trykket er enormt når jentene vender tilbake til AT&T Stadium for å innta banen for første gang siden uttaket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Payoff
programme.desc: Det er treningsleirens siste dag og alle er nervøse for at Kelli og Judy skal velge ut en tropp med færre enn 36 medlemmer. Etter noen tøffe beslutninger forvandles skrekk til glede når sluttroppen kunngjøres.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: Denne sesongen har 400 jenter våget å drømme stort at de kan bli en av de verdensberømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. De satser alt når de preliminære uttakene for 2015-2016-troppen begynner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Tjuetre veteraner melder seg på uttaket for å konkurrere mot 59 nybegynnere som vil ta plassene deres. Talent og utseende er ikke nok for å sikre en plass i troppen. Drømmer både går i oppfyllelse og knuses når kun 46 kommer seg til leiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: An Emotional Beginning
programme.desc: Treningsleiren begynner og Kelli sier hvor skapet skal stå. Noen av jentene bryter sammen når de innser hvor vanskelig det er å bli en DCC. Melissa Rycroft gir dem håp og råd om hvordan de skal klare seg.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cuts Begin
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må sende ti jenter hjem for å komme ned til troppens magiske 36. Tilpassingen av drakter viser Kelli hvem som har alt. Når de begynner å sende folk hjem, knuses drømmer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Becoming World Class
programme.desc: Jentene får DCC-looken, som er til hjelp for noen, men ikke andre. To gjester overrasker på treningen og rocker DCCs verden. Kelli opplever en av de pinligste kontorsbesøkene noensinne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day
programme.desc: Cameo- og showgruppe-uttak presser de nye og veteranene til bristepunktet. Melissa Rycroft forsøker å redde en DCC som henger i en tynn tråd, og et besøk på Kellis kontor avsluttes på en sjokkerende måte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cutting Board
programme.desc: Følelsene stormer når Kelli og Judy må ta vanskelige valg og sende folk hjem for å beholde troppens kvalitet. Melissa Rycroft deler ut uvurderlige råd.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Kelli kunngjør endelig troppen. Skader truer starten på Cowboys treningsleir. Kaos på kampdagen kan ødelegge for jentene når opptredenen må være feilfri.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Drømmen starter
programme.desc: Hundrevis av vakre og talentfulle håpefulle ankommer for å prøve å bli verdens beste heiagjeng. Samtidig søker mange av jentene som må dra, forsoning.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Nydebut-jentene
programme.desc: Veteranene kjemper for plassene mens de nye prøver å leve drømmene og gjennomgå treningsleiren til DCC. De stilles overfor panelintervjuer, soloer, en slitsom dansekombinasjon og et rom med tøffe dommere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dette er sværingene
programme.desc: De nye kandidatene får en tankevekker om hva det innebærer å være en DCC. Jentene kjemper for å lære dansene. Melissa Rycroft treffer nykommerne for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya, Sara, and Lilly
programme.desc: Maya, an adopted Border Collie/Spring Spaniel Mix loves to jump but is hurting her owner’s neck. Next we meet Sara, an overly-aggressive Shepherd mix and Lilly, a pushy Poodle.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Riley & Sophie, Aussie and Lulu, Bebe, & Sasha
programme.desc: A couple of adopted basset hounds have a bad case of sibling rivalry. A dingo mix from Australia hasn't adjusted to her new life in California. An overly protective poodle.
programme.sub-title: Riley & Sophie, Aussie and Lulu, Bebe, & Sasha

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Dasher, Riley, and Fosse
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound bites the hand that touches his toys; a 125-pound mastiff expands his grudge against the mailman; and a Yorkie has a shocking dislike of home appliances. Can Cesar help?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Fondue, Chip, Hope & Joyjoy, and Elmer
programme.desc: A Hollywood couple had to turn down work because their French bulldog failed the Doggy Daycare entrance exam. Three Jack Russells began to fight each other when their owner got a serious boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: Fondue, Chip, Hope & Joyjoy, and Elmer

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bella & Big Boy, and Gracie
programme.desc: Marley and Me author John Grogan gets a new yellow Lab. Just like Marley, Gracie needs lessons in respect. Paul Frank Industries lets employees bring their dogs to work.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Woody & Wally, various dogs, and Kane
programme.desc: Cesar shows mail carriers in Roswell, Georgia, how to deal with close encounters of the four-legged kind. Next, Cesar meets a pair of Pomeranians that flip out when left alone.
programme.sub-title: Woody & Wally, various dogs, and Kane

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Tori, Cassie & Skyler, and Tallulah, Bella, Boris, & Groucho, and Howie
programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and an abused lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.
programme.sub-title: Tori, Cassie & Skyler, and Tallulah, Bella, Boris, & Groucho, and Howie

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Dexter and Nasir
programme.desc: A Chicago art teacher wants to unify her adopted Rottweiler/shepherd’s dual personality. Singer Patti LaBelle is afraid of her guard dog, an aggressive 150-pound South African boerboel.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Calvin, Rudy, and Milo
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix needs help recovering from a car accident that left him with three-legs; a manic Jack Russell chases motorcycles; and a border collie's herding instincts are out of control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Titan, Candy and Bella
programme.desc: A new puppy has "Young and Restless" soap star Michael Damian's cat cornered, MTV's "Downtown" Julie Brown wants to unspoil her Yorkie, and a 120-pound Rottweiler needs anger management training.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is so devoted to his owner that he breaks leashes to be with her; a neurotic beagle makes trouble for a pack of foster dogs; and an Italian mastiff puppy fears riding in cars.
programme.sub-title: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bodhi, Maggie & Molly, and Bojo
programme.desc: Bloodhound/Catahoula mix, Bojo, is aggressive when it comes to mealtime. Molly and Maggie, two territorial Maltese, and a Kerry Blue Terrier in need of some calm assertive energy.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Chloe and various dogs
programme.desc: Cesar Millan joins the volunteers of United Hope for Animals to rescue stray pets, and to educate the citizens of Tijuana about the serious problem of overpopulation of dogs and cats in Mexico.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine
programme.desc: When several tenant's canines can't seem to get along, Cesar is called in to restore peace to a dog friendly complex. Cesar meets two feuding Chihuahuas and a Jack Russell Terrier.
programme.sub-title: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Cotton, Ricky, and Lila & Duke
programme.desc: An American Eskimo watchdog who takes his role too far; a Shibu Inu with a mean streak; a boxer who was attached by another dog one day in the park, and has since become more aggressive.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Amber, Snoopy, & Schroeder
programme.desc: A couple who can’t seem to control their high-strung Golden Retriever mix; Snoopy, a belligerent Bearded Collie; and Schroeder, an adopted a Lhasa Apso/Cavalier King Charles Spaniel mix with a bad case of separation anxiety.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lotus, Rocco, Hootie
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace in a spiritual home after Lotus doesn’t live up to his tranquil name; A lesson on keeping dogs safe from venomous wildlife; The return of Hootie.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Kiko, Tootsie & Ginger, and Binkey
programme.desc: A bullying miniature pinscher moves to Camp Pendleton. A Chihuahua mix. Writer, actor and director Mike White’s French bulldogs are out of control.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.
programme.sub-title: In the Forests of the Night

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Vincent must choose loyalties when a childhood friend becomes a mob enforcer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Junction
programme.desc: A modern-day miner has an argument with his wife and then goes off to work in the local mine. A collapse traps him, but he finds another survivor - a miner who claims to be from 1912.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Two
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Odyssey of Flight 33
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Dingle, the Strong
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Static
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Joy Ride/Private Channel
programme.desc: Four teens take a recently deceased man's classic car for a joyride. / On an airplane, a storm transforms a boy's walkman into a telepathic device that informs him that the man sitting next to him is carrying a bomb.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Voices in the Earth
programme.desc: In the far future, an expedition returns to a desolate barren Earth where a scientist begins to see the ghosts of those who died years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Song of the Younger World
programme.desc: In 1916 a girl and a young man from a reformatory for wayward boys fall in love and try to get away from her father, the superintendent. He finds out and doesn't approve of their love, locking away his daughter and punishing the boy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Girl I Married
programme.desc: An attorney and his wife have successful careers. They feel something is lacking in their marriage. Soon, they encounter younger versions of their mates.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Prime Mover
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: 100 Yards over the Rim
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Rip Van Winkle Caper
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Curious Case of Edgar Witherspoon
programme.desc: A woman tries to get her Uncle Edgar committed, believing that he is senile. The investigating doctor finds Edgar living in an apartment containing all kinds of junk.
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Edgar Witherspoon

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Extra Innings
programme.desc: Ex-baseball player Ed Hamler, lame from an injury and forced to retire early is given a 1909 baseball card of a player that looks exactly like him. The card is magical in that he becomes drawn into it and lives out the life of the player in the past.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Crossing
programme.desc: A stressed-out priest repeatedly encounters a station wagon containing a young girl. The car keeps crashing and bursting into flames.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunters
programme.desc: A young boy falls into an undiscovered cave near a housing project. An archeologist studies strange paintings on its walls and then bizarre things begin to happen. Cave items move around and animals are killed and brought into the cave.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mind and the Matter
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dream Me a Life
programme.desc: A man in a retirement home dreams of a woman holding back a monster, and in real life realizes the woman is his cataleptic neighbor.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Memories
programme.desc: A hypnotist who specializes in helping people relive their past lives tries to find her own history. She hypnotizes herself and when she awakens, she learns that everyone can now remember their past lives. They also desperately want to forget them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hellgramite Method
programme.desc: An alcoholic goes through an extremely painful and potentially deadly cure for his drinking problem. He has to choose which is more important - the bottle or his life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Our Selina is Dying
programme.desc: A young woman, Debra, comes to live with her mysterious family, including the dying patriarch Selena. After Selena clutches Debra's hand firmly leaving an odd spot on it, Debra begins to age very fast while Selena rejuvenates.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Obsolete Man
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Arrival
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Call
programme.desc: A lonely man accidentally phones the wrong number and finds an intriguing female to whom he grows attached. When she refuses to meet him, he investigates and finds the phone in a museum next to the statue of a woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision
programme.desc: Newly promoted bank loan officer Warren Cribbens cracks his eyeglasses and discovers he can see the future through them. Faced with seeing the future of the farmers whose farms he must foreclose on, Warren can't bring himself to foreclose.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Sandman
programme.desc: Employed as a Sandman, Sabrina gets into trouble dropping into other people’s dreams.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Silent Movie
programme.desc: The Spellman house becomes the setting for a silent movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts travel to Hawaii for a family reunion, but when they arrive, Sabrina discovers that she will not be able to enjoy herself until she solves the family secret once and for all.
programme.sub-title: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: No Place Like Home (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina’s senior year of high school gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dream A Little Dreama Me
programme.desc: Her Witches License and a new student bring Sabrina a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Jealousy
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey starts spending a lot of time with his best friend.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Little Orphan Hilda
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Spoiled Rotten
programme.desc: New charge card from the Other Realm causes Sabrina to forget that the most important things in life can’t be bought.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Prelude To A Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s new coffeehouse co-worker poses a threat to her relationship with Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully
programme.desc: Sabrina goes a little overboard in her attempt to seem more mature for the attentions of a college boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry
programme.desc: Paying the price for kissing Josh, Sabrina must adjust to life after Harvey.
programme.sub-title: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Now You See Her Now You Don’t
programme.desc: Adhering to a fad diet from the Other Realm, Sabrina becomes so thin she literally disappears.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Her Now You Don’t

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Super Hero
programme.desc: Childhood dreams come true when Sabrina casts a spell that turns Harvey into a superhero.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem’s Daughter
programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Every Witch Way but Loose
programme.desc: After spending the summer trying to get over her first love, Sabrina decides to make some changes in her life, including attending college and living away from home like a normal freshman.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Double Time
programme.desc: In order to keep up with the overwhelming academic and social demands of college life, Sabrina puts herself under a complicated time spell to move at lightning speed, but she later discovers that the extra time got sucked away from her roommates.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Homecoming
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.

programme.title: Fem i familien: To Snatch a Keith
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Speed Trap
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Batter Up
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse worry that Jennifer's softball team coach is pushing the girls too hard.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Not An Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Working At It
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Sweet Lorraine
programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.title: Fem i familien: This Year's Model
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birthday Boy
programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Diary of a Young Girl
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Anniversary Waltz
programme.desc: For their 20th anniversary, Steven wants a small gathering, but Elyse wants a big party. Everything goes wrong, leading to constant arguing - with the kids worrying how things might end.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Go Tigers
programme.desc: Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Keaton Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 'M' Is For the Many Things
programme.desc: Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Say Uncle
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ladies Man
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lady Sings the Blues
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Graduate
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Double Date
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Baby Boy Doe
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Gambler
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Fabric Smarts
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lost Weekend
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Little Man on Campus
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Best Man
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Keaton and Son
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.
programme.sub-title: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger

programme.title: Fem i familien: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Hotline Fever
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Greenie Board
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG: True Calling
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rogue
programme.desc: As the lowest-ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: JAG: The Colonel's Wife
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Panama to investigate the possibility that the wife of the Marine officer in charge of interdicting drugs from Columbia was smuggling drugs into the US.

programme.title: JAG: Mishap
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG: Into the Breach
programme.desc: Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG: Boomerang (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG: People V. Gunny
programme.desc: Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: JAG: The Bridge At Kang So Ri
programme.desc: Harm and Mac board a plane bound for Korea to investigate charges that GI's shot and killed civilians during the Korean War.
programme.sub-title: The Bridge At Kang So Ri

programme.title: JAG: Drop Zone
programme.desc: Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG: Real Deal Seal
programme.desc: Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG: Overdue And Presumed Lost
programme.desc: A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG: A Separate Peace-Part 1
programme.desc: A few days before his promotion to the command of the Sixth Fleet, RAdm Boone, an old acquaintance of Harmon Rabb, Sr.reminisces with Cmdr Harmon Harm Rabb, Jr. about the Vietnam war. Their conversation is interrupted by SECNAV who bears shocking news.

programme.title: JAG: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG: To Walk on Wings
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Past Tense
programme.desc: Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold
programme.desc: Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.
programme.sub-title: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold

programme.title: The Love Boat: Oh, Dale! / The Main Event / A Tasteful Affair

programme.sub-title: Oh, Dale! / The Main Event / A Tasteful Affair

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers
programme.desc: In "Ex Plus Y," newlyweds Terri and Ron Larson (Loretta "M*A*S*H" Swit and Richard "Soap" Mulligan) are adjusting well until Terri encounters ex-husband Barney (Robert Reed) aboard ship with his lady friend.
programme.sub-title: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers

programme.title: The Love Boat: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha
programme.desc: In "Message for Maureen," a famous female tennis pro (Brenda Benet) confined to a wheelchair as the result of a serious accident, finds herself in a relationship with a sports writer (Bill Bixby) who was once her severest critic.
programme.sub-title: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha

programme.title: The Love Boat: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity
programme.desc: In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.
programme.sub-title: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.
programme.sub-title: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.
programme.sub-title: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found
programme.desc: A boy befriends a couple that recently lost its young son. A trainee schemes to steal Julie's job. A bickering married couple takes the cruise and stays in separate cabins...next door to each other.
programme.sub-title: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery
programme.desc: An advice columnist neglects her husband to devote all her time to her fans, prompting him to seek affection elsewhere. A man with a negative history with Capt. Stubing fills in for the ailing chef.
programme.sub-title: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, the captain worries about how to effectively lead his ship but be a friend to his crew as well. A married couple who outwardly appear happy and in love are both desperate for the other person to give them a divorce.
programme.sub-title: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters
programme.desc: A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters

programme.title: The Love Boat: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle
programme.desc: A woman who believes her departed dad was a noble sea captain forms an attachment for a devilish old purser; a newlywed couple are prevented by dislocated backs, sunburn, and even poison ivy from enjoying their honeymoon.
programme.sub-title: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time
programme.desc: Isaac's possessive mother becomes jealous of her son's lady friend, while he objects to his mom sharing a cabin with her latest boyfriend; a divorced comedy team is too busy making jokes to admit they miss each other.
programme.sub-title: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Millionaire superstars Roz and Bill (Michele Lee and Fernando Lamas) have remarried and are celebrating their newest honeymoon aboard the Pacific Princess in "Hollywood Royalty."
programme.sub-title: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson
programme.desc: A congressman unjustly accused of being involved in a scandal seeks refuge aboard the Pacific Princess; Isaac and a lovely intellectual snob clash over a colorful old passenger.
programme.sub-title: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.
programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Eraser
programme.desc: MacGyver is enjoying playing in a scrimmage with a professional hockey team when Pete Thornton recruits him to solve an international espionage case.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Human Factor
programme.desc: MacGyver is called in to test the unique security system of a top-secret research and development lab. The system, which is designed to entrap and exterminate intruders, malfunctions, trapping its creator, Jill Ludlum, and MacGyver inside.

programme.title: MacGyver: Eagles
programme.desc: In the wilderness, MacGyver and 10-year-old Darin Cooper intervene to save the lives of a pair of golden eagles injured by poachers. The poachers go after MacGyver -- witness to their crime -- and taking Darin and his mother hostage.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Wish Child
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a young boy from the ominous fate of a centuries-old legend.

programme.title: MacGyver: Twice Stung
programme.desc: MacGyver, Pete Thornton, and Joanne Remmings (The Phoenix Foundation's resident bunco expert) pull a sting operation against a con man who cheated their friend out of his life savings.

programme.title: MacGyver: Final Approach
programme.desc: When their plane crashes in the wilderness, MacGyver and four teenage gang leaders struggle for survival.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack of Lies
programme.desc: When MacGyver agrees to bail out an old buddy, he winds up on a rescue mission in Central America to save another old buddy from drug smugglers.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Road Not Taken
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton travel to Southeast Asia to rescue a group of orphans, a nun, and Mac's old flame, Debra Easton, whose lives are threatened by an oppressive regime.

programme.title: MacGyver: Silent World
programme.desc: MacGyver and a deaf school teacher, Carrie Linden, live out a nightmare when they stumble upon an ex-CIA agent's ingenious plan to steal a missile, piece by piece, and sell it on the black market.

programme.title: MacGyver: Three for the Road
programme.desc: MacGyver battles the mob while protecting an elderly couple who have unwittingly become mixed up in a syndicate counterfeiting operation.

programme.title: MacGyver: Phoenix under Siege
programme.desc: Trapped inside the Phoenix Foundation by a group of terrorists, MacGyver races against a ticking bomb to save his life and that of his grandfather's.

programme.title: MacGyver: Family Matter
programme.desc: MacGyver is the Thorntons only hope when they are taken hostage in the swamps of Louisiana by an ex-agent seeking revenge.

programme.title: MacGyver: Soft Touch
programme.desc: MacGyver uncovers an assassination plot against an informer threatening to expose a drug trafficking network.

programme.title: MacGyver: Birth Day
programme.desc: MacGyver battles ex-cons to save the life of a woman and her unborn child.

programme.title: MacGyver: Pirates
programme.desc: MacGyver is on the trail of thieves using high-level Navy tactics to steal the 18th-century treasure.

programme.title: MacGyver: Out In the Cold
programme.desc: While vacationing on the slopes, MacGyver and Pete Thornton become targets of a mob "hit" squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack Is Back (Aka "Dalton, Jack of Spies")
programme.desc: MacGyver and his rapscallion buddy Jack Dalton are back together again this time they are up against a CIA agent gone bad and his cohorts, who are smuggling top-secret documents out of the country.
programme.sub-title: Jack Is Back (Aka "Dalton, Jack of Spies")

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits a central Pennsylvanian cheese maker with an award-winning mozzarella; inside grocery giant Kroger as they slice, shred and package over 2.5-million lbs. of cheese per week.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They're the meat in our sandwiches and slices of American pop culture; take a look behind the deli counter to reveal the secret ingredients in baloney; watch a master sausage maker craft salami, and pile it on at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits baking behemoth Entenmann's to see how they keep up with America's insatiable demand for delicious and dunkable chocolate chip cookies; Otis Spunkmeyer creates the cookies found at some of the biggest restaurant chains in America.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adam Richman gets to see how Wise produces over 50 million bags of sweet and salty snacks per month; how Jack Link's is changing the jerky game.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Soft drinks, donuts, meat snacks, popcorn, and gum represent humanity's need to feed cravings; from handmade treats of earliest civilizations to hi-tech mass production, these snack foods evolved through history into modern manufacturing.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Extruders, molds, in-line conveyor belts; are these machines manufacturing adhesives, plastics, or parts for your car? No, they're making treats for your mouth--and you will see them doing their seductively tasty work in this scrumptious episode.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how Jelly Belly creates delicious jellybeans in every flavor; then Adam Richman explores kitchen innovator Blue Apron's 495,000 square foot facility.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The sugar industry developed through Caribbean slavery and British control desires; sugar played critical roles in American independence while modern Hawaiian plantations process cane stalks into raw sugar, corn syrup, and various sweetener forms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Trace the butchering trade's evolution from corner butchers to industrial disassembly lines; tour Chicago Stockyards remains where Sinclair, Birdseye, and refrigeration changed the industry, plus modern quality controls and rural custom butchers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From water and grain, to mash, still, vat, barrel and bottle, the distilling of alcoholic spirits is a big business and near-sacred religion; its acolytes eye the color, swirl the glass, inhale the bouquet, sip, and then ponder their ambrosia.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Distillation of spirits represents art, science, and vapor-water marriage in a billion-dollar business; visit brandy, liqueur, moonshine, and absinthe distilleries including Christian Brothers, Deep South moonshine, and French Courvoisier Cognac.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Barbecue evolved from old-fashioned cooking into modern multi-billion dollar industry; explore famous cook-offs, established restaurants like Arthur Bryant's Kansas City, post-WWII backyard phenomenon, Weber kettle grills, and spicy sauce varieties.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Stories of those who believed in dreams and defied the commonplace with their extraordinary creations; covering some of the world's architectural and engineering structures, scientific inventions, and social wonders.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Food trucks are hitting the big time; across much of America, they're changing the way people eat; from humble beginnings as chuck wagons and hot dog carts, they've taken off as ethnic eateries, gourmet specialists, and even high-tech mega trucks.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adam Richman works the line at White Castle to discover how they grill and serve over a million sliders daily; he looks for the secret behind Colonel Sanders' famous 11 herbs and spices at KFC headquarters; he visits the first drive-thru in the U.S.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The complex logistics behind creating feasts for huge crowds; dining aboard a U.S. Navy sub packed with enough food for a 120-day mission; cooks prepare a "Victory Meal" for 1,000 Marines; feeding 69,000 NFL fans during a Philadelphia Eagles game.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The biggest stacked burger in the world at almost 250 pounds; a plus-sized Sicilian pizza that feeds almost 75 people; a 72-ounce steak that no real cowboy can resist; the seven-pound hot dog that's too big for a bun; a giant cupcake.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Fairgrounds fried classics such as funnel cakes and churros; frog legs; Twinkies and Coke; forging a cast iron frying pan; Kentucky's World Chicken Festival.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Hot and spicy items; Tabasco sauce made by McIlhenny Co. in Louisiana; McCormick & Co. spices from Baltimore; chili cook-off; capsaicin gives peppers tongue-burning heat; Michael Jordan's SolToro Tequila Grill in Connecticut.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of ice cream ranging from the gelato of Italy and a 19th-century French process to today's frozen desserts; visiting Dreyer's, TCBY and Joy Cone Co. factories; Ben & Jerry's flavor innovations.
