programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Chris asks FantomWorks to breathe new life into a 1951 Mercury Woody that was sitting in a chicken coop for thirty years. Dan’s 1970 Mustang Boss arrives with a long list of problems and the speed of a sea slug.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1983 Avanti shows up with $58,000 worth of mismatched parts and an escalating cascade of hidden problems. A 3100 Chevy Pick-up rolls in with rope holding the doors shut, but the team soon learns that this is the tip of a very ugly iceberg.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 48 Dodge 4 door coupe are ready for the airbags to be installed. The 66 Corvette has a custom frame that is unique to Muscle Cars of Texas.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Will Gets Grumpy
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Donnie decides that he wants to take his 1968 Fastback to SEMA, Dan and FantomWorks are thrown for a loop. Now, they need to get the Fastback and a 1964 Corvette to the prestigious show within a crushing time frame.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Gary wants to restore a 1964 Mercedes 230SL, but his tight budget launches Dan into a headlong battle with a 50-year-old interior and a shattered cam shaft. Al wants to restore his father’s GTO, but FantomWorks discover it’s not the car Al thinks it is.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: A Fly in the Ointment
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Walter brings his 1975 Bricklin back to FantomWorks with the hope that Dan can fix problems that were created when it was built. And then add missiles. Tim’s 1954 Imperial hasn’t run in decades and everything on the car is locked up solid.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mopar or No Car
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Kolin asks Dan to repair his smashed up 1973 Corvette, but Dan finds major problems that existed before the accident. Jim wants Dan to build him an asphalt crushing 1970 Challenger convertible by adding a 426 Hemi with all the fixin’s.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: FantomWorks dives into prototype hell to give Nick a superfast 1969 Chevrolet Chevelle with an LT4 engine. Barlen wants his mother’s 1957 Chevrolet Bel Air to run like a dream for her birthday. Unfortunately, her birthday is in 30 days.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and team at Muscle Cars of Texas are working on a frame restoration on the 1972 Corvette. From Ugly to beautiful. The 59 Ford pickup truck is ready to go home to the owner. The 1964 Corvette Fuelie gets a new bumper.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: This Roadrunner gives me a Hemi

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: In honor of wounded veterans, Dan and the team attempt a near-impossible conversion by making a 1970 Chevelle SS handicapped accessible. The shop's first pre-war restoration of a 1926 Velie with no manuals or parts takes them into uncharted territory.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Brad wants a 1967 Mustang Coupe to be new again; so Dan has to fight the way the car was initially built by the factory. Jay wants a stunning 1965 TR4, but he plans to do most of the work himself. Instead, the Fantomworks side of the job keeps growing.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Kim and Doug want to drive her father’s hyper-rare 1959 Thunderbolt, but the car was only set up for the racetrack. Batalla is a legendary motorcycle builder who asks Dan to restore his prized possession - a 1947 Knucklehead.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man learns that the girl he's in love with is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A lonely spy-story writer buys her murdered hero's sports car, which comes complete with his ghost.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cold-hearted businessman is given the opportunity to relive the last week of his life. And he tries to do the right thing this time.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A runaway dog unites a boy in an orphanage with its human family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The orphan boy has formed an attachment to the dog, although he is going away to living with a new foster family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A trainer is reminded of his own shady past when a fighter he's been mentoring is asked to take a fall.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help a doctor confront a secret he's kept from everyone, including his own family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Jonathan helps a little boy get over his fears, and in the process, get even with his older sister!
programme.sub-title: I Was a Middle Aged Werewolf

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan casts a retired comic and his movie-star son in a play about a father and son who never got to know each other.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.
programme.sub-title: All the Colors of the Heart

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A love triangle develops involving a mild-mannered man, a tough female prospector and her long-lost husband.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Papa for Butch and Ginger
programme.desc: Wyatt's deputy, Shotgun Gibbs, runs off a saddle bum who was hassling a pretty young widow who had hired him to help her go to Colorado.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When Claypool swindles McSween out of his gold mine, storekeeper Hobart has an idea for retribution.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: It Had to Happen
programme.desc: After Bat's shirt sleeve is hit by a bullet from a gunman Earp had hit in the shoulder, Mayor Kelley tell Earp he must shoot to kill which causes him to have second thoughts about his job.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Clay Allison
programme.desc: Pete Albright tries to hire gunfighter Clay Allison to kill Earp to open up Dodge City. Allison won't take money but is willing to kill Earp.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with creative ways to make it happen.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc Adams considers it a threat to both him and his patients when a woman doctor arrives to become his replacement.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gunman kills a young challenger and becomes a target for revenge—from his own son, as well as the victim's family.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: In the conclusion of a two-part episode, Ben Snow tries to get his long-hidden gold back to civilization to use in fighting an old enemy.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A cattle baron and a legendary frontiersman involve Marshal Matt Dillon in their life-and-death dispute over a hat.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A notorious gang of marauders known as The Dog Soldiers swears vengeance against Matt Dillon for the execution of one of their members.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured Western hero to lure tourists into his dying town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The saga regarding the need for and development of blue jeans by Levi Strauss during the California Gold Rush.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A mine operator insists on having his workers continue in unsafe conditions that are prone to cave-ins.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Culture comes to a mining town with the arrival of a piano, but nobody knows how to play it.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two prospectors play a cruel joke: they offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The Emperor of Brazil has an encounter with two imaginative youngsters while traveling to San Francisco.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Last Stand at Smoky Hill
programme.desc: Bat leads a group of hunters on a buffalo hunt believing huge herds have returned. When Earp learns the Apache have left their reservation to hunt them, he attempts to warn the group.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Judas Goat
programme.desc: A Deputy US Marshal from Topeka asks Earp to help capture a gang of outlaws led by Rocky Griswold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Charlie Bates' dream about a hold-up becomes a reality — and he becomes the suspect.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A jack-of-all-trades man stumbles across a way to improve the water wheel.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo recounts his rise as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A greedy merchant creates panic by spreading rumors that the town's supply lines are cut off by snow.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Sarah og Amy er bestevenner for livet og nå arrangerer de sin første kunstutstilling i en liten by i New England. Når en mystisk fremmed dukker opp, starter et mysterium med narkotika, CIA og Sarahs elskede onkel. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Harlequin: A Change of Place
programme.desc: When troubled twin Dominique asks her bookish sister Kimberly to assume her role for a month as a glamorous Parisian model, Kimberly hesitates.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hvor ekstrem bordtennis kan være i 'Pinpongvondt', blir kilt, rosa, svart og blå i en 'Kiletrøkk' og får justert ryggraden med noen 'Bakoverbøyere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kommer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farlig nær kanten i 'Uten kantfølelse', får bowlingvondt i 'Baneovertredelser' og trenger å slå av konsollen i 'Gamevrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood sinte i helt feil situasjoner i 'Malplassert raseri', stikker av fra flaue opplevelser med 'Skamsortier' og blir helt uspiselige på flyplassen i 'Terminaltroll'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av bestselgende forfatter Greg McKeown og gjør vanskelige ting 'Uten anstrengelse' og mister oversikten over hva som er viktig i 'Absolutt ikke essensielt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood smerte i vannparker i 'Vannparkskadet', møter par som elsker å gjøre stunt i 'Akropar' og ser på farene med fallende istapper i 'Risktapper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' sammenligner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood arr på haka i 'Hakesmeller', får se at drikking skader mer enn kjøring i 'Styrtdumt' før de ser på noen ville hoppere som 'Hopper uten å sjekke'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness feirer Rob, Steelo og Brooke Schofield mannehjernene i 'Guttesmart, er sammen med unike hunder i 'Merkelige bisker' og får uventet en smell i knollen i 'Hode mot hode'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' braser Rob, Steelo og Brooke Schofield gjennom døra i 'Pinefulle hjemkomster', samler jentene og får oppleve 'Partyjentepine' og ser på problemer med nettingdører i 'Unger mot skjermer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Skye Townsend opp og får oppleve 'Dumme vitser-kustus', raser over ende i 'Klubbfall' og ser på splitter nye biler som 'Taper verdi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Skye Townsend i bakken på dansegulvet og opplever 'Dansesvie', får smarte tips av 'Oppfinnsomme fedre' og blir litt for opphisset av sport i 'Raserianfan'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood seg en dobbel dose med smerte i 'Smerteekko', møter noen onde bastarder i 'Barnehatende hunder' og blir satt ut av folk med 'Planløs langfinger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på folk som hviler i 'Liggende nedslag', blir frekke med eldre damer med sølvtunge i 'Bestemorsnert' og opplever fallskjermhoppere i trøbbel som gjør 'Tvilsomme hopp'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har en drøm om et gameshow som kan avsløre løgner, og når hun våkner, hører hun en buzzer i hodet hver gang noen forteller henne en løgn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har mistanke om at en savnet kvinne kan være et offer for hennes merkelige barn. I mellomtiden dukker Joes søster Sarah opp uanmeldt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner fem år tilbake i tid etter at hun og Devalos blir skutt av en fremmed. Tidligere har Allisons drømmer fortalt henne at Devalos vil dømme en uskyldig mann for drap.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En mann ved navn Lucas Harvey forfølger Allison, overbevist om at han gjør Guds arbeid ved å kvitte seg med henne og hennes evner.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å bli plaget av Lucas Harvey, hennes besatte stalker. Harvey forstyrrer Allisons drømmer, noe som gjør henne lite hjelpsom for Devalos og Scanlon under en sak om en seriemorder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha falt i koma under en etterforskning, finner Allisons ånd veien inn i kroppen til en mann ved navn Todd Emory.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison henvender seg til Cynthia Keener (som nå er i fengsel) når hun begynner å drømme om et tidligere kidnappingsoffer som Cynthia en gang reddet.
programme.sub-title: The First Bite Is the Deepest

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens Allison takler Joes jobbflytting til San Diego, drømmer hun om og møter deretter en bankansatt ved navn Mrs. Boddicker som forutså et ran i banken hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når aspekter av Allisons drøm om å miste hele familien begynner å skje i virkeligheten, frykter hun at drømmen hennes kan gå i oppfyllelse.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og familien hennes må håndtere resultatene av hjerneoperasjonen hennes. Eieren av en lokal TV-stasjon ber også Devalos og Scanlon om å undersøke om sportsankeret hans blir forfulgt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret etter at Ariel begynner å vise merkelig oppførsel, og begynner å tenke at en myrdet stripper kan besitte henne.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allisons kreftrammede venn dør uventet, mistenker hun at en sykehusansatt kan ha skylden. Bridgette skriver en historie veldig nær det som senere skjer på Joes jobbintervju.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir forvirret når hun begynner å se visjoner om merkelige symboler. Når en seriemorder slår Phoenix, oppdager hun at symbolene kan være ledetråder for å fange morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Et spedbarn blir kidnappet fra Allisons nabolag, og hun blir så fast bestemt på å finne barnet at Joe frykter at hun kan ha blitt besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons mareritt utspiller seg i scener fra den klassiske filmen Night of the Living Dead, og får henne til å våkne opp med merkelige sår, men også med ledetråder i saken om et drap på en begravelsesagent.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison leier en SUV etter at bilen hennes er skadet, og hun oppdager at SUVens satellittradio lar henne lytte til andres samtaler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Ariel begynner å date en gutt fra skolen, har Allison visjoner som indikerer at han kan være involvert i et lokalt mord.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter på merkelig vis å ha blitt følsom for lys, bruker Allison et par solbriller som viser merkelige tall som kan være relatert til folks forventede levealder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Hovedmistenkte i en drapssak dør, og politiet er overbevist om at han var skyldig. Men når den døde mannen kontakter Allison, sier han at han er uskyldig og at han vil hjelpe henne med å finne morderen.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is dismayed when a Russian princess who claims to be a psychic mesmerizes the town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must help Grace and Robert E. realize that their adopted son may die from his mysterious illness.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike’s sister returns to town to champion prohibition, just as Jake’s self-doubts about Teresa send him on an uncontrollable drinking spree.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike risks her life to battle a deadly diphtheria epidemic that threatens the town and her own family.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Tragedy hovers over Dr. Mike’s family, and Daniel falls seriously ill, as the diphtheria epidemic continues to rage.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must judge her neighbors when litigation fever strikes Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike tries to mediate a treaty with the Indians despite the arrival of a famed Indian hater.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The approach of Christmas finds Dr. Mike and Sully far from home, while Daniel ponders an offer to leave Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is shot point blank by a man with a grudge against doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen finds herself the subject of a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is sworn to secrecy when she learns that Loren plans to move away for good.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike matches medical skills with an elderly Chinese doctor and his 'grandson' to avert an epidemic.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully attempt to free cloud dancing from prison, as Teresa’s marriage to Jake is threatened by her aunt.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must decide if a human birdman should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshall Elias Burch asks law-student Matthew to defend him when he’s accused of murder.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela and Sully reminisce about the ups and downs of their relationship and make a momentous decision about their future.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Robert E vents his frustration over the death of his son and the demise of his marriage by stepping into the ring with a traveling boxing champion.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike’s elation at Colleen’s acceptance to medical school quickly turns to disappointment when colleen chooses to marry Andrew instead.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle og Alexis "gjørmebryter" over Blake. Bart avslører sine følelser for Steven, mens en privatetterforsker avdekker Barts tidligere kjærlighetsforhold. Garretts mistanker om hvem som er Jackies far vokser.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tar Ben Carrington med på maskeradeballet. Adams plan om å utpresse Bart Fallmont settes i verk. Garrett konfronterer Dominique med mistanken om at Jackie er datteren hans.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Barts hemmelige fortid er en triumf for Denver-Carrington, men Blake står overfor et mulig nederlag i rettssaken mot broren, Ben. Dex avviser Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jackie oppdager at faren hennes står oppført som «ukjent» på fødselsattesten. Alexis kjøper selskapet som planlegger å publisere Caress' bok.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blakes håp om seier knuses av et beruset vitne. Bart blir vraket som senatorkandidat. Kvinnen som kan renvaske Blakes navn er tvunget til å skjule sin identitet.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake taper rettssaken og frykter at han skal miste Denver-Carrington. Ben og Alexis setter seg opp mot Blake og Caress. Garrett finner ut at han er Jackies far.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress oppdager Emily og Bens hemmelighet, og Blake blir forrådt av en gammel venn. Alexis pønsker ut en plan for å vende den kinesiske regjeringen mot Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake blir lurt til å låne penger fra Alexis. Jackie kommer hjem med sjokkerende nyheter. Blake finner ut hvem kvinnen som kan redde omdømmet hans er.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: En skyldbetynget Alexis frykter at hun er for sent ute når hun finner Amanda bevisstløs. Dominique frir til Garrett. Steven tror han kan miste Danny til Sammy Jo og Clay.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Ben beviser at Blake og Alexis er uhederlige og får kontroll over leiekontraktene i Sør-Kina-havet. Steven prøver å avdekke Adams hemmelighet. Dominiques bryllup nærmer seg.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake angriper Alexis når hun prøver å overta herskapshuset. En forstyrret Claudia fanges av en vegg av flammer. Sammy Jo og Amanda kjemper om Clays gunst.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle berger livet til Alexis ved å roe ned en rasende Blake. Mens La Mirage brenner, blir Amanda reddet av en mystisk fremmed. Claudia omkommer i brannen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: En rasende Blake ser avisoverskriftene som anklager ham for mordbrann. Adam sverger på å være lojal mot Alexis og Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Når Krystle kommer seg etter ulykken, overtaler Alexis statsadvokaten til å mistenke Blake for mordbrann. Dominique tilbyr Blake et lån på 50 millioner dollar.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake sparker sjefen på La Mirage for å ha holdt tilbake viktig informasjon om brannen. Alexis tilbyr en belønning for å få arrestert og dømt brannstifteren.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystles svimmelhet får henne til å oppsøke legen. Jackie husker at hun så at La Mirage-brannen startet på Claudias rom, og beviser at Blake er uskyldig.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blakes reise til Caracas for å befri Caress mislykkes. Dex frir til Alexis og blir avvist. Dex går med på å hjelpe Blake med å få Caress ut av fengsel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake og Dex greier å befri Caress fra fengselet, og hun vender tilbake til Denver med en sterk hevnlyst.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här ger Rickard Olsson tips om saker du inte får missa när du er på Åland.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för Rickard Olsson att ta sig till Normandie för att besöka de historiska platserna från Andra Världskriget.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här besöker Rickard Olsson, Almunécar. Han tar sig ut på kulturhistoriska platser såväl som världsberömda vingårdar eller träningsresor över hela världen. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för att ta sig ned till Schweiz för att prova på att åka med den berömda Glaciärexpressen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig ned till Polen för en rundresa till Krakow och Warzawa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig med på en Whiskeyresa och tågresa till Skottland

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard reser till storstaden London för att se vad den har att erbjuda. Följ med honom när han utforskar julmarknader, åker skridskor och besöker världsberömda platser.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Följ med Rickard på en resa till Rostock för den perfekta julekänslan.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Følg med oss på resa til Afrika.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången befinner vi oss i Kroatien tillsammans med More Sailing som arrangerar seglingsresor över hela världen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Programmet leds av en av Sveriges allra mest rutinerade teveprofiler, Rickard Olsson. Han tar sig till platser, städer och områden som han är nyfiken på. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Det är dags för ett nytt avsnitt av reseprogrammet "Nyfiken På" med Rickard Olsson på afterworktv.se Denna gången åker vi till Italien för att följa med Rolf Flyg och Buss på en vinresa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Vi besöker Gardasjön i Italien och får en fantastisk cykeltur.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är Rickard Olsson i Berlin tillsammans med Scandorama och deras gruppresa. Tillsammans med gruppen åker han på dagsutflykter till historiska platser men får även uppleva det nya Berlins mest populära och trendiga områden.

programme.desc: Inter, en av verdens mest berømte fotballklubber, åpner arkivet sitt for en helt ny kanal med ikoniske Nerazzurri-legender og historiske sportsøyeblikk. Fra klubbens storhetstid til de siste triumfene, som førte til den «andre gylne stjernen».

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.
programme.sub-title: Is There In Truth No Beauty?

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When coming to a xenophobic isolationist planet, Captain Kirk and his landing party are punished for trespassing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: At the same time McCoy discovers that he has a year to live, the U.S.S. Enterprise encounters the asteroid Yonada which is determined to be artificially propelled.
programme.sub-title: For The World Is Hollow And I Have Touched The Sky

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.
programme.sub-title: Let That Be Your Last Battlefield

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With startling revelations weighing in on him, Scott (Tyler Posey) finds himself scrambling to protect the people he loves, including Allison (Crystal Reed) who begins to follow clues left by her Aunt Kate about her family history.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While struggling with family secrets, Allison (Crystal Reed) focuses on the Winter Formal dance. Meanwhile, as the tensions between werewolves and hunters rise to a boiling point, Scott (Tyler Posey) struggles to protect both friends and enemies.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the season finale, Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) discovers one last clue which allows him to enlist both friends -- and even a previous enemy -- in order to stop the mysterious killings and win back Allison (Crystal Reed), the girl he loves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Lydia (Holland Roden) goes missing from the hospital, werewolves and hunters alike begin a search to discover not only where she is, but what she may have become. Meanwhile Jackson's (Colton Haynes) body seems to be fighting against the bite.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: The night before a full moon, Isaac's father (John Wesley Shipp) is murdered. When Isaac (Daniel Sharman) is arrested, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) resolve to break him out before the Argents get to him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to stop Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) from creating new werewolves, while Chris Argent (JR Bourne) decides to officially begin Allison's (Crystal Reed) training. Meanwhile, the new creature in Beacon Hills takes another victim.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When the shapeshifter strikes again, Scott (Tyler Posey) has to recruit a reluctant Allison (Crystal Reed) to acquire a rare book from Gerard's (guest star Michael Hogan) collection, while also once again surviving dinner with the Argents.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) becomes convinced that Lydia (Holland Roden) is the shapeshifter they're after since she seemed immune to its toxin, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) to gather his friends -- and even some enemies -- to protect her.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With startling new information about the shapeshifter, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hurry to protect their friends while Allison (Crystal Reed) is given an investigative task by her family. And there is "panic at the disco."

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Lydia (Holland Roden) makes connections about the bite from Peter (Ian Bohen). Jackson (Colton Haynes) causes problems for Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has a crisis of faith in his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: During a secret concert, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with a method to trap the new shapeshifter. At the same time, Allison's mother (Eaddy Mays) comes up with a plan of her own to take care of Scott once and for all.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Even as his relationship with Allison (Crystal Reed) is further strained, Scott (Tyler Posey) must attend Lydia's (Holland Roden) birthday party while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) locks up his new wolves on their first full moon together.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With a secret revealed, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien), Melissa and Stilinski are taken hostage in the Sheriff's station. Allison (Crystal Reed) then tracks Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) to the station, bringing Argent and Gerard with her.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) must help win the championship lacrosse game while also trying to figure out how to stop Gerard (Michael Hogan). At the same time, Alison (Crystal Reed) and Argent (JR Bourne) continue their hunt of Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the second season finale, although everyone is still reeling from a shocking death on the lacrosse field, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends rush to figure out Gerard's (Michael Hogan) master plan…but Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has his own plan.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the exciting Season 3 premiere, a new Alpha Pack arrives to wreak havoc on Scott's (Tyler Posey) life, while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Isaac (Daniel Sharman) struggle to locate Erica (Gage Golightly) and Boyd (Sinqua Walls).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Allison and Lydia stumble on a clue to finding Boyd and Erica, while a childhood friend of Stiles goes missing. Meanwhile, Derek is surprised by the reappearance of someone from his past…someone he thought had died in the Hale house fire.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Boyd (Sinqua Walls) and Cora (Adelaide Kane) on the loose and under the influence of the full moon, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) find that they may have to turn to an unlikely ally for help…Chris Argent (JR Bourne).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to keep Isaac (Daniel Sharman) from engaging in a deadly confrontation with the Twins in school, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) attempts to prove his theory that the killings have absolutely nothing to do with werewolves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: During a bus ride to a cross country meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends flash back to the events of a preemptive strike against the Alphas that has left several injured and possibly one or more dead.

programme.desc: Niki's multi-million dollar action movie opens, as rumors circulate about her sexuality. Meanwhile, Tasha's military trial ends in a surprise.

programme.desc: As an intense heat wave blankets the city, a love scene sparks jealousy in Jenny. Meanwhile, Bette and Tina decide to see a couples counselor.

programme.desc: HIT! hosts a big dance marathon for charity. Tina gets a job offer. Alice begins to suspect there's something going on between Tasha and Jamie.

programme.title: The L Word

programme.desc: Rebecca gets more than she bargained for during a day out with Darryl. Josh lends a helping hand to Paula, while Heather encourages Nathaniel to be a nice person.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca takes a trip to visit her mother while Josh housesits for Rebecca and finds it harder than it seems. Meanwhile, Nathaniel and Paula team up in an unexpected way.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca decides that she needs to find a way to take her mind off her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca tries to stick to her plan for happiness while Nathaniel and Maya bond over their feelings of unrequited love.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca and Greg take a day trip, things don't go quite as planned. Meanwhile, Paula has an incredibly stressful week.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca tries out for the local community theater, while Paula is courted by various law firms.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca gets a call to help her old nemesis out of a complicated situation. Meanwhile, Nathaniel, Josh and Greg attempt to deal with their competing feelings for Rebecca.

programme.desc: Rebecca spends time with Nathaniel, Josh, and Greg in an attempt to get clarity on her feelings.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca makes a life-changing decision about her future that will change the course of her life.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rachel Bloom and the cast of the critically acclaimed series perform live versions of fan-favorite songs with incredible staging, multimedia visuals and a live band and orchestra.
programme.sub-title: Yes, it's Really Us Singing. The Crazy-Ex Girlfriend Concert Special!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca Bunch (Rachel Bloom) is a successful, driven, and possibly crazy young woman who impulsively gives up everything in a desperate attempt to find love and happiness in that exotic hotbed of romance and adventure: suburban West Covina, Calif.
programme.sub-title: Josh Just Happens to Live Here!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca learns that Josh has a gorgeous yoga instructor girlfriend named Valencia, she is determined to learn everything about her. Rebecca attempts to learn yoga and tries to get into the local nightclub Josh and Valencia go to.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: In an attempt to get closer to Josh, Rebecca throws a housewarming party despite her lack of social connections in West Covina and a childhood fear of hosting parties.
programme.sub-title: I Hope Josh Comes to My Party!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca learns that Josh and Valencia seem as happy as ever, she goes into a spiral and vows to make healthier choices. As a result, when nice guy Greg asks her out on a date, she wonders if that is the path towards a happier life.
programme.sub-title: I'm Going on a Date with Josh's Friend!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: After Rebecca and Greg's disastrous date, Greg accuses her of being a terrible person in front of Josh. Rebecca takes drastic measures to prove she is a good person, which includes helping Darryl with his messy divorce.
programme.sub-title: Josh and I Are Good People!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca scores an invite to the Chan family Thanksgiving festivities, where Josh's parents fall in love with her much to Valencia's dismay. Meanwhile, Greg struggles with taking care of his dad and wanting to pursue his dreams.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca has a tough week after learning some news about Josh and someone surprising shows up to help her - Dr. Phil. Paula is pursued by an important new client Calvin and not just professionally.
programme.sub-title: I'm So Happy that Josh is So Happy!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: It is the holidays and Rebecca's mom decides to come visit her in West Covina. Old habits die hard and Rebecca, eager to please her mom, embellishes some facts about her life, which all comes crashing down at a local holiday event.
programme.sub-title: My Mom, Greg's Mom and Josh's Sweet Dance Moves!

programme.desc: Marty faces a moral dilemma when he discovers evidence of a banking client's role in a cover-up scheme.

programme.desc: Jeannie meets an unlikely suitor when consulting with an adult toy company. While on the engagement, Doug is struck with inspiration for a wild gift idea for his new girlfriend.

programme.desc: Doug and Clyde are summoned to testify in a legal deposition for their role in a wrongful death suit filed against a big telecommunications company.

programme.desc: As Reno waits out his pending appeal for murder, he is transfered to Paso Perdido Penitentiary where he finds himself in danger from the prison population as well as the law.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno is saved during a bar fight by a man strongly resembling Elvis Presley, he attempts to track down 'the King' to express his thanks as well as satisfy his curiosity.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno goes to the aid of his Karate Master when one of the master's former pupils attacks a San Francisco councilwoman.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno goes to New Orleans after cold-blooded murderer, he finds himself the recipient of a 'dead man's curse'.
programme.sub-title: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno saddles up to help when a friend of Bobby's is injured after uncovering a group of cattle rustlers operating through a traveling rodeo.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno and Cheyenne must pump themselves up when they go after a former weight lifter turned drug dealer

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno finds himself an unwilling celebrity while in San Diego tracking a 'rave' party coordinator who is responsible for the near death of a teenage party goer.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno finds himself as prey in the middle of a dangerous 'hunt' after he and Bobby meet up with a former protege of Sixkiller Enterprises.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno locates a missing teen, he finds it nearly impossible to persuade her to leave her seemingly comfortable life as a high-priced call girl.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno finds himself in a dangerous web when his former partner turns to him for help in locating a dirty cop she testified against who has now issued a 'contract' on her life.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Bobby finds his liquid assets quickly evaporating when his banker embezzles 150 million dollars and heads to sunny Mexico.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno and Bobby get more than they gambled for when they head to Las Vegas in pursuit of an escaped bank robber suffering from multiple personalities.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Bobby gets a new lesson in fear when he heads up to Santa Barbara State College after a serial killer responsible for the disappearance of 5 coeds.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno tackles a new profession while trying to flush out the killer of 3 'Repo Men'.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno attempts to capture a murderer while meeting with a local Real Estate dealer, which results in the real estate dealer's death during a gunfire exchange.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E4 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 2: Wait For The Wheel
programme.desc: The crew works out a way of getting free from the other ship and out of the wormhole.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E4 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 2: Wait For The Wheel

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E5 - Different Destinations
programme.desc: Stark accidentally sends himself, Crichton, Aeryn. D'Argo and Jool are back in time where they alter the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E6 - Eat Me
programme.desc: In need of supplies, Crichton lands his transport pod on a dying leviathan which is full of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E7 - Thanks For Sharing
programme.desc: Moya rendezvous with Talyn who is seriously damaged. They hide in the atmosphere of a planet to prevent the Peacekeepers from finding them.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E7 - Thanks For Sharing

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E8 - Green Eyed Monster
programme.desc: Talyn is swallowed by a boodong, leaving Stark and Rygel stranded in a transport pod.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E8 - Green Eyed Monster

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E9 - Losing Time
programme.desc: The crew of Moya starts blacking out and missing portions of time.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E10 - Relativity
programme.desc: Talyn lands on a planet covered mostly with vegetation that will help him to heal. Crichton, Aeryn and Crais leave the ship in search of Xhalax.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E11 - Incubator
programme.desc: Scorpius puts the neural chip into his own brain in an attempt to retrieve vital wormhole equations from Crichton.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E12 - Meltdown
programme.desc: Talyn gets the urge to fly into a sun. While in its vicinity Stark is contacted by an alien woman who is being held against her will.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E13 - Scratch 'N Sniff
programme.desc: Crichton, D'Argo, Jool and Chiana are forced to take a holiday by Pilot as he is fed up with their constant bickering.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E14 - Infinite Possibilities, Part 1: Daedalus Demands
programme.desc: Crichton must seek out an old friend who has gained too much knowledge about wormholes.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E14 - Infinite Possibilities, Part 1: Daedalus Demands

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E15 - Infinite Possibilities, Part 2: Icarus Abides
programme.desc: Jack (The Ancient) unlocks the wormhole knowledge in Crichton's mind so together they can build a device to destroy the Scarran dreadnought.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E15 - Infinite Possibilities, Part 2: Icarus Abides

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E16 - Revenging Angel
programme.desc: D'Argo injures Crichton, as Crichton lies in a coma/near death, he escapes into a highly animated world. It's Farscape, Chuck Jones/Loony Tunes style.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E17 - The Choice
programme.desc: Aeryn is devastated. She leaves Talyn, and grieves on a planet. Talyn's crew tries to help but she doesn't want their help.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E18 - Fractures
programme.desc: A group of escaped prisoners come aboard Moya followed shortly by Aeryn, Crais and Rygel who have finally returned from Talyn.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E19 - I - Yensch, You - Yensch
programme.desc: D'Argo and Rygel meet Braca and Scorpius in a cafe to conduct negotiations when it is unexpectedly attacked.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E19 - I - Yensch, You - Yensch

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E20 - Into The Lion's Den, Part 1: Lambs To The Slaughter
programme.desc: The crew must stop Scorpius's research on wormhole technology. The only way to stop him is to board the command carrier.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E20 - Into The Lion's Den, Part 1: Lambs To The Slaughter

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E21 - Into The Lion's Den, Part 2: Wolf In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Crais gets Talyn to starburst inside the command carrier, causing it to collapse in on itself.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E21 - Into The Lion's Den, Part 2: Wolf In Sheep's Clothing

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E22 - Dog With Two Bones
programme.desc: Moya takes Talyn's remains to the sacred burial ground where D'Argo is forced to destroy a rogue Leviathan that is attacking other ships.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E22 - Dog With Two Bones

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: With Dennis Ryland's help, NTAC tracks down the remaining members of the Nova Group. Nikki pays Shawn an unexpected visit.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana are drugged with a hallucinogen, which was created from an oil secreted from the hands of a 4400.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Kevin Burkhoff becomes a marked man when his research on promicin is discovered. Tom and Diana search for Kevin, but discover how far he will go to protect his work. Shawn meets his idol at the 4400 Center.
programme.sub-title: The Ballad Of Kevin And Tess

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana's investigation into a series of gruesome murders leads them to uncover another conspiracy within the government. At the 4400 Center, Shawn receives a gift from another returnee that allows him to see his future.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: NTAC and the 4400 Center work together to find Jordan Collier. Kyle Baldwin gets a surprising visitor at the state prison.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Nova Group members that were in the custody of NTAC escape from jail with outside help from Jordan Collier. Diana tells April about her relationship with Ben. Shawn and Richard learn that Isabelle is working with Dennis Ryland.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana continue their investigation on Jordan Collier's plan for mankind. Dennis Ryland returns to NTAC. Isabelle is seriously injured when she takes a classroom hostage.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A high school student develops an ability after injecting promicin. Tom visits Isabelle in jail, while Diana searches for her missing sister. Following the advice of a young woman named Cassie, Kyle is able to wake Shawn from his coma.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana search for a person who has the ability to make people's worst fears come to life. Danny seeks Shawn's help in finding a promicin shot. Cassie leads Kyle to a book that contains a prophecy about Jordan Collier.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Audrey Parker develops the ability to astral project herself. However, after she is murdered, Audrey attempts to use her ability to lead Tom and Diana to her killer.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: April's new ability endangers her life. Shawn is approached to run for public office, while Kyle helps Isabelle.
programme.sub-title: The Truth And Nothing But The Truth

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: After realizing Tom knows he is promicin-positive, Kyle joins Jordan in a remote town called Evanston. Tom follows Kyle, and learns the remarkable truth about Evanston: all of its residents are promicin-positive.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana search for Curtis Peck, a 4400 film maker whose ability allows him to `know` the truth behind historical conspiracies. Jordan tries to recruit Shawn into his movement.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Jordan and his followers annex a run-down part of Seattle, dubbing it `Promise City`. Shawn's campaign for city council is threatened when a woman accuses him of using his healing ability in exchange for sex.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A lockdown at NTAC threatens the lives of Tom, Diana, Meghan, Shawn, Kyle, Jordan, Isabelle, Maia, Marco, PJ and Brady when they wakeup inside the building with no recollection of how they got there.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Richard kidnaps Isabelle from Collier's Promise City. Richard hopes to start a new life with his daughter. Elsewhere, Tess has taken over a 1950's diner, and Shawn is asked to intervene.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: The Director of National Intelligence pressures NTAC to pursue Richard and Isabelle. Richard is visited by his dead wife, Lily.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A computer virus attacks a large software company owned by a suspected member of The Marked. Maia visits Promise City and receives an unexpected birthday gift.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Isabelle works with Tom in order to get close to Jordan. Shawn recruits a small band of promicin positives to break Kevin out of Promise City. Tom and Diana face off in the backroom of a grocery store, and Diana is forced to shoot Tom.

programme.title: The Millers: When The Pope Comes Marching In
programme.desc: When the Pope is scheduled to come to town, Nathan's planned week-long series of reports hits a snag when Ray gets a job offer to become the cameraman for a rival field reporter.
programme.sub-title: When The Pope Comes Marching In

programme.title: The Millers: Papa Was a Rolling Bone
programme.desc: The Millers decide to spend Thanksgiving apart for the first time ever, but they rethink the new family tradition when all their individual Turkey Day plans hit unexpected snags.

programme.title: The Millers: Louise Louise
programme.desc: When The Millers get a visit from their elderly Aunt Louise (Cloris Leachman), they rally to help her figure out what her legacy will be when she worries that she hasn't left her mark on the world yet.

programme.title: The Millers: Highway to the Manger Zone
programme.desc: When staging their church's annual living nativity scene does not go as planned, Kip urges the Millers to stage their own rival show.

programme.title: The Millers: Hero
programme.desc: When Nathan decides he should have a better relationship with his niece Mikayla, he agrees to use his celebrity status to help Debbie and Adam get her into a popular school.

programme.title: The Millers: Pilot
programme.desc: Nathan and his sister, Debbie, are upset when their parents announce they're divorcing after 43 years of marriage.

programme.title: The Millers: Stuff
programme.desc: Nathan hatches a plan to get his parents back together by showing them all of their sentimental family possessions in the hopes it will make them remember the good times they've had.

programme.title: The Millers: The Phone Upgrade
programme.desc: Nathan and Debbie trade parents when they each think the other sibling has it easier.

programme.title: The Millers: Plot Twists
programme.desc: When Carol dictates that it's time to rearrange the family's positions in the Millers cemetery plot because of the two divorces.

programme.title: The Millers: The Mother Is In
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Nathan is seeing a therapist, she secretly makes an appointment for herself in order to find out what's going on.

programme.title: The Millers: Giving The Bird
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Nathan, Debbie, and Adam take Mikayla trick-or-treating to the house of an old woman who everyone in the neighborhood thinks is a witch.

programme.title: The Millers: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: When Nathan gets frustrated after he's forced to drive Carol around town for errands once again, he demands that she either learn how to drive or find another chauffeur.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: The Millers: You're In Trouble
programme.desc: When Nathan learns why Debbie is Tom's favorite child instead of him, he decides it's time to fill his parents in on some of Debbie's childhood secrets.

programme.title: The Millers: The Talk
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Tom never had "the talk" with Nathan about the birds and the bees, she insists it's not too late to gather the family together and do it now.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town
programme.desc: When Carol's overbearing mother and father announce they're coming to visit for Christmas, Carol recruits Nate and Tom to cover up their failed relationships and present a happy facade.
programme.sub-title: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town

programme.title: The Millers: Dear Diary
programme.desc: When Debbie suspects Nathan and Carol of secretly reading her diary, she and Adam plant a fake entry about Tom in order to prove it. Ernie Hudson guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Miller's Mind
programme.desc: Nathan learns to appreciate Carol's incessant rants after he mimics one of them at work and is rewarded with his own news segment to complain on the air.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Surprise
programme.desc: Nathan is determined to finally, just once, surprise the "unsurpriseable" Carol on her birthday. Brandon Routh guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: You Betcha
programme.desc: Nathan asks Tom to spend the weekend with him in the hopes of finding something they have in common.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Millers: Walk-n-Wave
programme.desc: Worried that his mother has made him feel like he's better than other people, Nathan befriends a hopeless co-worker, Doug, who turns out to be a social outcast and more than Nathan knows how to handle.

programme.title: The Millers: Cancellation Fee
programme.desc: Nathan tries to date his mother's dentist in secret after Carol adds her to the Miller Family Blacklist for charging her a $75 cancellation fee for being late to her appointment.

programme.title: The Millers: 72
programme.desc: When Tom proudly tells the family he's dating a much younger woman, Nathan goes undercover to spy on him and make sure his father isn't being scammed by a gold digger.

programme.title: The Millers: Sex Ed Dolan
programme.desc: Nathan introduces his boss, Ed Dolan, to Tom in hopes they'll hit it off and hang out together, but surprisingly, Dolan only has eyes for Carol. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Carol has the worst Mother's Day ever when Nathan forgets to get her a present.

programme.title: The Millers: Movin' Out (Carol's Song)
programme.desc: Carol begins her search for a new apartment, causing Nathan and Debbie to race each other to find her a place that is the farthest away from each of them.

programme.title: The Millers: CON-Troversy
programme.desc: Nathan is assigned to cover a Sci-Fi Fest for his workplace and runs into a famous book author who has hated him since grade school.

programme.title: The Millers: Reunited and It Feels So Bad
programme.desc: Tom and Carol decide to formally end their marriage but are surprised when they both hesitate to finalize the divorce, sending Nathan and Debbie into a panic at the thought of their parents reconciling.
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Bad

programme.title: The Millers: Give Metta World Peace a Chance
programme.desc: Nathan lands the biggest interview of his career with professional basketball player Metta World Peace, but when karma catches up with him, he risks ruining his professional reputation.
programme.sub-title: Give Metta World Peace a Chance

programme.title: The Millers: Diggin' Up Bones
programme.desc: In an attempt to get Carol to be more daring, Kip encourages her to confront her old Central Elementary School work nemesis, Miss Pam (Molly Shannon), at the teacher's retirement party.

programme.title: The Millers: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man
programme.desc: When Ray points out that Nathan has a history of being the worst wingman ever, Nathan embarks on a mission to be a better friend by becoming less self-involved.
programme.sub-title: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man

programme.title: The Millers: When The Pope Comes Marching In
programme.desc: When the Pope is scheduled to come to town, Nathan's planned week-long series of reports hits a snag when Ray gets a job offer to become the cameraman for a rival field reporter.
programme.sub-title: When The Pope Comes Marching In

programme.title: The Millers: Papa Was a Rolling Bone
programme.desc: The Millers decide to spend Thanksgiving apart for the first time ever, but they rethink the new family tradition when all their individual Turkey Day plans hit unexpected snags.

programme.title: The Millers: Louise Louise
programme.desc: When The Millers get a visit from their elderly Aunt Louise (Cloris Leachman), they rally to help her figure out what her legacy will be when she worries that she hasn't left her mark on the world yet.
